task.spawn(function()
    task.wait(2)
    local _, names = getChildrenList()
    childDropdown:SetValues(names)
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        if godModeSpamActive then
            pcall(function()
                ReplicatedStorage.RemoteEvents.DamagePlayer:FireServer(0/0)
            end)
        end
        task.wait(0.1)
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        if godModeSpamActive then
            pcall(function()
                ReplicatedStorage.RemoteEvents.AnalyticsTimeFirstPerson:FireServer(0, 60)
            end)
        end
        task.wait(1)
    end
end)

Library:Notify("已加载", 5)
]===]

ServerScripts["键盘速度逃脱"] = [===[
local function safeLoad(url)
    local success, result = pcall(function()
        return loadstring(game:HttpGet(url))()
    end)
    if not success then
        warn("加载失败: " .. url)
        return nil
    end
    return result
end

local Library = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/黑曜石主库.ui")
local ThemeManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/主题管理.ui")
local SaveManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/配置管理.ui")

if not Library then
    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification", {
        Title = "错误",
        Text = "UI 库加载失败，请检查网络或脚本资源",
        Duration = 5,
    })
    return
end

local Options = Library.Options
local Toggles = Library.Toggles

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local rootPart = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

local moveSpeed = 16
local customSpeedEnabled = false
local speedFluctuation = 5
local fluctuationToggle = false
local lastFluctuationUpdate = 0

local autoFarmEnabled = false
local autoFarmMoveSpeed = 80
local autoFarmTargetIndex = 1
local autoFarmPoints = {
    Vector3.new(-56.5, 9.1, 72.0),
    Vector3.new(69.2, 9.1, -13.8)
}

local autoWinEnabled = false
local autoWinPos = Vector3.new(-13998.3, 754.7, 3064.6)

local function getCurrentHumanoid()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        return char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    end
    return nil
end

local function cleanup()
    autoFarmEnabled = false
    autoWinEnabled = false
    customSpeedEnabled = false
    moveSpeed = 16
    speedFluctuation = 5
    local hum = getCurrentHumanoid()
    if hum then
        hum:Move(Vector3.zero, false)
        hum.WalkSpeed = 16
    end
end

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newChar)
    character = newChar
    humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    rootPart = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
end)

-- 每帧强制锁定速度 + 自动刷移动 + 自动刷胜利
RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(dt)
    local hum = getCurrentHumanoid()
    if not hum then return end
    
    local hrp = hum.Parent and hum.Parent:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    
    -- 优先级：自动刷胜利 > 自动刷速度 > 修改移速
    if autoWinEnabled then
        if hrp then
            local dist = (hrp.Position - autoWinPos).Magnitude
            if dist > 1 then
                hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(autoWinPos)
            end
        end
    elseif autoFarmEnabled then
        hum.WalkSpeed = autoFarmMoveSpeed
        
        if hrp then
            local target = autoFarmPoints[autoFarmTargetIndex]
            local dist = (target - hrp.Position).Magnitude
            
            if dist < 5 then
                autoFarmTargetIndex = autoFarmTargetIndex == 1 and 2 or 1
            else
                local dir = (target - hrp.Position).Unit
                hum:Move(Vector3.new(dir.X, 0, dir.Z), false)
            end
        end
    elseif customSpeedEnabled then
        if speedFluctuation > 0 then
            local now = tick()
            if now - lastFluctuationUpdate >= 0.3 then
                lastFluctuationUpdate = now
                fluctuationToggle = not fluctuationToggle
            end
            hum.WalkSpeed = fluctuationToggle and (moveSpeed + speedFluctuation) or (moveSpeed - speedFluctuation)
        else
            hum.WalkSpeed = moveSpeed
        end
    end
end)

local Window = Library:CreateWindow({
    Title = "速度键盘逃脱",
    Footer = "恐拜大帝 制作",
    Icon = 131153193945220,
    NotifySide = "Right",
    ShowCustomCursor = true,
})

Library:Notify("速度键盘逃脱脚本 - 创作者：恐拜大帝", 5)

local Tabs = {
    Notice = Window:AddTab("通知", "info"),
    Main = Window:AddTab("功能", "info"),
    Settings = Window:AddTab("设置", "settings"),
}

local NoticeGroup = Tabs.Notice:AddLeftGroupbox("作者消息")
NoticeGroup:AddLabel('恐拜大帝将持续更新此脚本')
NoticeGroup:AddLabel('创作者：恐拜大帝')

-- ==================== 玩家修改（左侧分组） ====================
local PlayerGroup = Tabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("玩家修改")

PlayerGroup:AddToggle('CustomSpeedToggle', {
    Text = '修改移速',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '开启后可自定义移动速度',
    Callback = function(Value)
        customSpeedEnabled = Value
        if not Value then
            local hum = getCurrentHumanoid()
            if hum then hum.WalkSpeed = 16 end
        end
    end
})

PlayerGroup:AddSlider('WalkSpeedSlider', {
    Text = '速度调整',
    Default = 16,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 200,
    Rounding = 0,
    Suffix = "",
    Callback = function(Value)
        moveSpeed = Value
    end
})

PlayerGroup:AddSlider('FluctuationSlider', {
    Text = '防检测波动',
    Default = 5,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 50,
    Rounding = 0,
    Suffix = "",
    Tooltip = '在设定速度上下波动，0为固定速度',
    Callback = function(Value)
        speedFluctuation = Value
    end
})

PlayerGroup:AddButton({ 
    Text = '召唤飞行脚本', 
    Func = function()
        local success, err = pcall(function()
            loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/9178/refs/heads/main/fly.lua"))()
        end)
        if not success then
            Library:Notify("飞行脚本加载失败: " .. tostring(err), 3)
        else
            Library:Notify("飞行脚本已执行", 3)
        end
    end 
})

PlayerGroup:AddToggle('AutoFarmToggle', {
    Text = '自动刷速度',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '在两点之间平滑循环移动，人物处于走路状态',
    Callback = function(Value)
        autoFarmEnabled = Value
        if not Value then
            autoFarmTargetIndex = 1
            local hum = getCurrentHumanoid()
            if hum then
                hum:Move(Vector3.zero, false)
                hum.WalkSpeed = 16
            end
        end
    end
})

PlayerGroup:AddSlider('AutoFarmSpeedSlider', {
    Text = '自动刷速度',
    Default = 80,
    Min = 10,
    Max = 300,
    Rounding = 0,
    Suffix = " studs/s",
    Callback = function(Value)
        autoFarmMoveSpeed = Value
    end
})

-- ==================== 游戏修改（右侧分组） ====================
local GameGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("游戏修改")

GameGroup:AddToggle('AutoWinToggle', {
    Text = '自动刷胜利（被检测了不要用）',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '锁定在胜利坐标，偏离后自动传送回去',
    Callback = function(Value)
        autoWinEnabled = Value
        if Value then
            local char = player.Character
            if char then
                local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if hrp then
                    hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(-13998.3, 754.7, 3064.6)
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

GameGroup:AddButton({ 
    Text = '传送到终点', 
    Func = function()
        local char = player.Character
        if not char then
            Library:Notify("角色不存在", 3)
            return
        end
        local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if not hrp then
            Library:Notify("未找到 HumanoidRootPart", 3)
            return
        end
        hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(-14006.9, 750.8, 3083.6)
        Library:Notify("已传送到终点", 3)
    end 
})

-- ==================== 设置 ====================
local SettingsGroup = Tabs.Settings:AddLeftGroupbox("菜单")
SettingsGroup:AddButton({ Text = '卸载脚本', Func = function()
    cleanup()
    Library:Unload()
end })

SettingsGroup:AddButton({ Text = '重载界面', Func = function()
    cleanup()
    Library:Unload()
    loadstring(game:HttpGet(game:GetService("HttpService"):UrlEncode("https://pastebin.com/raw/你的脚本地址")))()
end })

SettingsGroup:AddLabel('菜单快捷键'):AddKeyPicker('MenuKeybind', {
    Default = 'RightShift',
    NoUI = true,
    Text = 'Menu keybind'
})
Library.ToggleKeybind = Options.MenuKeybind

if ThemeManager then
    ThemeManager:SetLibrary(Library)
    ThemeManager:SetFolder("MyScriptTheme")
    ThemeManager:ApplyToTab(Tabs.Settings)
end

if SaveManager then
    SaveManager:SetLibrary(Library)
    SaveManager:IgnoreThemeSettings()
    SaveManager:SetFolder("MyScriptConfig")
    SaveManager:BuildConfigSection(Tabs.Settings)
end
]===]

ServerScripts["被遗弃"] = [===[
local function safeLoad(url)
    local success, result = pcall(function() return loadstring(game:HttpGet(url))() end)
    if not success then warn("加载失败: " .. url) return nil end
    return result
end

local Library = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/黑曜石主库.ui")
local ThemeManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/主题管理.ui")
local SaveManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/配置管理.ui")

if not Library then
    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification", {
        Title = "错误",
        Text = "UI 库加载失败，请检查网络或脚本资源",
        Duration = 5,
    })
    return
end

local Options = Library.Options
local Toggles = Library.Toggles
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

Library.AccentColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 170, 255)
Library.MainColor = Color3.fromRGB(25, 25, 25)
Library.BackgroundColor = Color3.fromRGB(20, 20, 20)
Library.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40)

local Window = Library:CreateWindow({
    Title = "被遗弃",
    Footer = "创作者：恐拜大帝",
    Icon = 131153193945220,
    NotifySide = "Right",
    ShowCustomCursor = true,
})

Library:Notify("被遗弃 - 创作者：恐拜大帝", 5)

local Tabs = {
    Notice = Window:AddTab("公告", "info"),
    Main = Window:AddTab("功能", "info"),
    ESP = Window:AddTab("透视", "info"),
    Settings = Window:AddTab("设置", "settings"),
}

local NoticeGroup = Tabs.Notice:AddLeftGroupbox("作者")
NoticeGroup:AddLabel('恐拜大帝将持续更新此脚本')
NoticeGroup:AddLabel('创作者：恐拜大帝')

local AutoGroup = Tabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("自动功能")

local lastAutoFix = 0
local lastAutoFixTP = 0
local autoFixConn = nil
AutoGroup:AddToggle('AutoFix', {
    Text = '自动修机',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '打开电机就自动修',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            autoFixConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                if tick() - lastAutoFix < 1.2 then return end
                lastAutoFix = tick()
                local map = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
                if not map then return end
                local ingame = map:FindFirstChild("Ingame")
                if not ingame then return end
                local mapFolder = ingame:FindFirstChild("Map")
                if not mapFolder then return end
                for _, gen in pairs(mapFolder:GetChildren()) do
                    if gen.Name == "Generator" then
                        local remotes = gen:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
                        local re = remotes and remotes:FindFirstChild("RE")
                        if re then
                            pcall(function() re:FireServer() end)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            if autoFixConn then autoFixConn:Disconnect() autoFixConn = nil end
        end
    end
})

local autoFixTPConn = nil
AutoGroup:AddToggle('AutoFixTP', {
    Text = '自动修机2（传送）',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '传送到发电机修',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            autoFixTPConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                if tick() - lastAutoFixTP < 1.2 then return end
                lastAutoFixTP = tick()
                local char = player.Character
                if not char or not char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then return end
                local hrp = char.HumanoidRootPart
                local map = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
                if not map then return end
                local ingame = map:FindFirstChild("Ingame")
                if not ingame then return end
                local mapFolder = ingame:FindFirstChild("Map")
                if not mapFolder then return end
                local nearest = nil
                local minDist = math.huge
                for _, gen in pairs(mapFolder:GetChildren()) do
                    if gen.Name == "Generator" and gen:FindFirstChild("Main") then
                        local dist = (gen.Main.Position - hrp.Position).Magnitude
                        if dist < minDist then
                            minDist = dist
                            nearest = gen
                        end
                    end
                end
                if nearest and nearest:FindFirstChild("Main") then
                    hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(nearest.Main.Position + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0))
                    local remotes = nearest:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
                    local re = remotes and remotes:FindFirstChild("RE")
                    if re then
                        pcall(function() re:FireServer() end)
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            if autoFixTPConn then autoFixTPConn:Disconnect() autoFixTPConn = nil end
        end
    end
})

local blockConn = nil
local lastBlock = 0
AutoGroup:AddToggle('AutoBlock', {
    Text = '自动格挡',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '自动格挡杀手攻击',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            local RemoteEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Modules"):WaitForChild("Network"):WaitForChild("RemoteEvent")
            blockConn = RunService.Stepped:Connect(function()
                local killersFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Players") and Workspace.Players:FindFirstChild("Killers")
                if not killersFolder then return end
                local char = player.Character
                if not char or not char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then return end
                local myPos = char.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                for _, killer in ipairs(killersFolder:GetChildren()) do
                    if killer:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        local dist = (killer.HumanoidRootPart.Position - myPos).Magnitude
                        if dist <= 15 then
                            if tick() - lastBlock >= 0.5 then
                                pcall(function() RemoteEvent:FireServer("UseActorAbility", "Block") end)
                                lastBlock = tick()
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            if blockConn then blockConn:Disconnect() blockConn = nil end
        end
    end
})

local autoItemConn = nil
AutoGroup:AddToggle('AutoItem', {
    Text = '自动捡道具',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '自动传送并拾取医疗包和可乐',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            autoItemConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                local char = player.Character
                if not char or not char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then return end
                local hrp = char.HumanoidRootPart
                local map = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
                if not map then return end
                local ingame = map:FindFirstChild("Ingame")
                if not ingame then return end
                local function pickup(name)
                    local item = ingame:FindFirstChild(name)
                    if item then
                        local itemRoot = item:FindFirstChild("ItemRoot")
                        if itemRoot then
                            itemRoot.CFrame = hrp.CFrame + hrp.CFrame.LookVector * 3
                            local prompt = itemRoot:FindFirstChildOfClass("ProximityPrompt")
                            if prompt then
                                pcall(function() fireproximityprompt(prompt) end)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                pickup("Medkit")
                pickup("BloxyCola")
            end)
        else
            if autoItemConn then autoItemConn:Disconnect() autoItemConn = nil end
        end
    end
})

local autoPizzaConn = nil
AutoGroup:AddToggle('AutoPizza', {
    Text = '自动吃披萨',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '生命值低于50时自动吃披萨',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            autoPizzaConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                local char = player.Character
                if not char or not char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") or not char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then return end
                local humanoid = char.Humanoid
                if humanoid.Health >= 50 then return end
                local hrp = char.HumanoidRootPart
                local pizzaFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Pizzas") or (Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map") and Workspace.Map:FindFirstChild("Ingame"))
                if not pizzaFolder then return end
                local closest, minDist = nil, math.huge
                for _, pizza in ipairs(pizzaFolder:GetDescendants()) do
                    if pizza:IsA("BasePart") and pizza.Name == "Pizza" then
                        local dist = (pizza.Position - hrp.Position).Magnitude
                        if dist < minDist then
                            minDist = dist
                            closest = pizza
                        end
                    end
                end
                if closest then
                    closest.CFrame = hrp.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 0, -2)
                end
            end)
        else
            if autoPizzaConn then autoPizzaConn:Disconnect() autoPizzaConn = nil end
        end
    end
})

local BoostGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("角色增强")

local staminaConn = nil
BoostGroup:AddToggle('InfiniteStamina', {
    Text = '无限体力',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '体力不会消耗',
    Callback = function(Value)
        local sprintingModule = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Systems"):WaitForChild("Character"):WaitForChild("Game"):WaitForChild("Sprinting")
        local function getModule()
            local success, mod = pcall(function() return require(sprintingModule) end)
            if success then return mod end
            return nil
        end
        if Value then
            staminaConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                local m = getModule()
                if m then
                    m.StaminaLoss = 0
                    m.StaminaGain = 9999
                end
            end)
        else
            if staminaConn then staminaConn:Disconnect() staminaConn = nil end
            local m = getModule()
            if m then
                m.StaminaLoss = 10
                m.StaminaGain = 25
            end
        end
    end
})


local jumpFloatGui, jumpFloatBtn, jumpPanel, jumpHeight = nil, nil, nil, 24
local jumpEnabled = false

local function createJumpFloat()
	if jumpFloatGui then jumpFloatGui:Destroy() end
	jumpFloatGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui", CoreGui)
	jumpFloatGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
	jumpFloatBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", jumpFloatGui)
	jumpFloatBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0,60,0,60)
	jumpFloatBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1,-80,1,-80)
	jumpFloatBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0,0.5,1)
	jumpFloatBtn.Text = "↑"
	jumpFloatBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
	jumpFloatBtn.TextSize = 40
	jumpFloatBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
	Instance.new("UICorner", jumpFloatBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1,0)
	local gearBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", jumpFloatGui)
	gearBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0,24,0,24)
	gearBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1,-86,1,-86)
	gearBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.2,0.2,0.2)
	gearBtn.Text = "⚙"
	gearBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
	gearBtn.TextSize = 18
	gearBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
	Instance.new("UICorner", gearBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1,0)
	jumpPanel = Instance.new("Frame", jumpFloatGui)
	jumpPanel.Size = UDim2.new(0,220,0,140)
	jumpPanel.Position = UDim2.new(1,-240,1,-160)
	jumpPanel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30,30,30)
	jumpPanel.Visible = false
	Instance.new("UICorner", jumpPanel).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,8)
	local closeBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", jumpPanel)
	closeBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0,20,0,20)
	closeBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1,-25,0,5)
	closeBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8,0.2,0.2)
	closeBtn.Text = "X"
	closeBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
	closeBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
	Instance.new("UICorner", closeBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1,0)
	closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() jumpPanel.Visible = false end)
	local heightLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel", jumpPanel)
	heightLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1,-30,0,30)
	heightLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0,10,0,5)
	heightLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	heightLabel.Text = "跳跃高度：" .. jumpHeight
	heightLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
	heightLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
	local inputBox = Instance.new("TextBox", jumpPanel)
	inputBox.Size = UDim2.new(0.6,0,0,30)
	inputBox.Position = UDim2.new(0.2,0,0,50)
	inputBox.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.2,0.2,0.2)
	inputBox.Text = tostring(jumpHeight)
	inputBox.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
	inputBox.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
	Instance.new("UICorner", inputBox).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,6)
	local confirmBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", jumpPanel)
	confirmBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0.4,0,0,30)
	confirmBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0.1,0,0,90)
	confirmBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0,0.6,0)
	confirmBtn.Text = "确认"
	confirmBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
	confirmBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
	Instance.new("UICorner", confirmBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,6)
	confirmBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
		local num = tonumber(inputBox.Text)
		if num and num >= 16 and num <= 100 then
			jumpHeight = num
			heightLabel.Text = "跳跃高度：" .. jumpHeight
		end
	end)
	local resetBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", jumpPanel)
	resetBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0.4,0,0,30)
	resetBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0.5,0,0,90)
	resetBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8,0.4,0)
	resetBtn.Text = "默认"
	resetBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
	resetBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
	Instance.new("UICorner", resetBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,6)
	resetBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
		jumpHeight = 24
		inputBox.Text = "24"
		heightLabel.Text = "跳跃高度：" .. jumpHeight
	end)
	gearBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() jumpPanel.Visible = not jumpPanel.Visible end)
	local function performJump()
		if not jumpEnabled then return end
		local char = player.Character
		if not char then return end
		local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
		local hum = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		if hrp and hum and hum.Health > 0 and hum.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air then
			hrp.Velocity = Vector3.new(hrp.Velocity.X, jumpHeight, hrp.Velocity.Z)
		end
	end
	jumpFloatBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(performJump)
end

local function destroyJumpFloat()
	if jumpFloatGui then jumpFloatGui:Destroy() jumpFloatGui = nil jumpPanel = nil jumpFloatBtn = nil end
end

BoostGroup:AddToggle('JumpToggle', {
	Text = '显示跳跃按钮',
	Default = false,
	Tooltip = '在屏幕右下角显示跳跃按钮',
	Callback = function(Value)
		jumpEnabled = Value
		if Value then
			if not jumpFloatGui then createJumpFloat() end
		else
			destroyJumpFloat()
		end
	end
})

local ESPGroup = Tabs.ESP:AddLeftGroupbox("玩家透视")

local killerAddedConn = nil

local function addKillerESP(killer)
    if not killer:IsA("Model") then return end
    if killer:FindFirstChild("KillerESP_Highlight") then return end
    local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
    highlight.Name = "KillerESP_Highlight"
    highlight.FillColor = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
    highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
    highlight.FillTransparency = 0.7
    highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0.1
    highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
    highlight.Parent = killer
    local head = killer:FindFirstChild("Head")
    if head then
        local bill = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        bill.Name = "KillerESP_Billboard"
        bill.Adornee = head
        bill.AlwaysOnTop = true
        bill.Size = UDim2.new(0, 40, 0, 15)
        bill.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 2, 0)
        bill.MaxDistance = 99999
        bill.Parent = head
        local text = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        text.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        text.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        text.Text = "杀手"
        text.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
        text.TextScaled = true
        text.TextSize = 12
        text.Parent = bill
    end
end

local function clearKillerESP()
    for _, v in pairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("Highlight") and v.Name == "KillerESP_Highlight" then
            v:Destroy()
        end
        if v:IsA("BillboardGui") and v.Name == "KillerESP_Billboard" then
            v:Destroy()
        end
    end
end

ESPGroup:AddToggle('KillerESP', {
    Text = '透视杀手',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '高亮显示杀手',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            local killersFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Players") and Workspace.Players:FindFirstChild("Killers")
            if killersFolder then
                for _, v in pairs(killersFolder:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("Model") then addKillerESP(v) end
                end
            end
            killerAddedConn = Workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(v)
                task.wait(0.1)
                if v:IsA("Model") and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local killersFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Players") and Workspace.Players:FindFirstChild("Killers")
                    if killersFolder and v:IsDescendantOf(killersFolder) then
                        addKillerESP(v)
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            clearKillerESP()
            if killerAddedConn then killerAddedConn:Disconnect() killerAddedConn = nil end
        end
    end
})

local survivorAddedConn = nil

local function addSurvivorESP(survivor)
    if not survivor:IsA("Model") then return end
    if survivor:FindFirstChild("SurvivorESP_Highlight") then return end
    local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
    highlight.Name = "SurvivorESP_Highlight"
    highlight.FillColor = Color3.new(0, 1, 1)
    highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.new(0, 1, 1)
    highlight.FillTransparency = 0.7
    highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0.1
    highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
    highlight.Parent = survivor
    local head = survivor:FindFirstChild("Head")
    if head then
        local bill = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        bill.Name = "SurvivorESP_Billboard"
        bill.Adornee = head
        bill.AlwaysOnTop = true
        bill.Size = UDim2.new(0, 40, 0, 15)
        bill.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 2, 0)
        bill.MaxDistance = 99999
        bill.Parent = head
        local text = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        text.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        text.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        text.Text = "幸存者"
        text.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 1)
        text.TextScaled = true
        text.TextSize = 12
        text.Parent = bill
    end
end

local function clearSurvivorESP()
    for _, v in pairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("Highlight") and v.Name == "SurvivorESP_Highlight" then
            v:Destroy()
        end
        if v:IsA("BillboardGui") and v.Name == "SurvivorESP_Billboard" then
            v:Destroy()
        end
    end
end

ESPGroup:AddToggle('SurvivorESP', {
    Text = '透视幸存者',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '高亮显示幸存者',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            local survivorsFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Players") and Workspace.Players:FindFirstChild("Survivors")
            if survivorsFolder then
                for _, v in pairs(survivorsFolder:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("Model") then addSurvivorESP(v) end
                end
            end
            survivorAddedConn = Workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(v)
                task.wait(0.1)
                if v:IsA("Model") and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local survivorsFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Players") and Workspace.Players:FindFirstChild("Survivors")
                    if survivorsFolder and v:IsDescendantOf(survivorsFolder) then
                        addSurvivorESP(v)
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            clearSurvivorESP()
            if survivorAddedConn then survivorAddedConn:Disconnect() survivorAddedConn = nil end
        end
    end
})

local ItemESPGroup = Tabs.ESP:AddRightGroupbox("道具透视")

local genAddedConn = nil
local generatorData = {}

local function createGeneratorESP(gen)
    if not gen or not gen:FindFirstChild("Main") then return end
    if generatorData[gen] then return end
    local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
    billboard.Name = "GeneratorESP"
    billboard.Size = UDim2.new(4, 0, 1, 0)
    billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 2.5, 0)
    billboard.Adornee = gen.Main
    billboard.Parent = gen.Main
    billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
    local textLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    textLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
    textLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    textLabel.Text = "电机"
    textLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255)
    textLabel.Font = Enum.Font.Arcade
    textLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
    textLabel.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
    textLabel.TextSize = 14
    textLabel.Parent = billboard
    local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
    highlight.Name = "GeneratorESP_Highlight"
    highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
    highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255)
    highlight.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255)
    highlight.FillTransparency = 0.9
    highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0
    highlight.Parent = gen
    generatorData[gen] = {billboard = billboard, highlight = highlight}
end

local function clearGeneratorESP()
    for gen, data in pairs(generatorData) do
        if data.billboard then data.billboard:Destroy() end
        if data.highlight then data.highlight:Destroy() end
    end
    generatorData = {}
end

ItemESPGroup:AddToggle('GeneratorESP', {
    Text = '发电机透视',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '显示发电机位置',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            for _, gen in pairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if gen:IsA("Model") and gen.Name == "Generator" and gen:FindFirstChild("Main") then
                    createGeneratorESP(gen)
                end
            end
            genAddedConn = Workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(v)
                if v:IsA("Model") and v.Name == "Generator" and v:FindFirstChild("Main") then
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    createGeneratorESP(v)
                end
            end)
        else
            clearGeneratorESP()
            if genAddedConn then genAddedConn:Disconnect() genAddedConn = nil end
        end
    end
})

local itemEspData = {}

local function createItemESP(item, name, color)
    if not item or not item:FindFirstChild("ItemRoot") then return end
    if itemEspData[item] then return end
    local root = item.ItemRoot
    local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
    billboard.Name = "ItemESP"
    billboard.Size = UDim2.new(3, 0, 1, 0)
    billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 1.5, 0)
    billboard.Adornee = root
    billboard.Parent = root
    billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
    local textLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    textLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    textLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    textLabel.Text = name
    textLabel.TextColor3 = color
    textLabel.Font = Enum.Font.Arcade
    textLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
    textLabel.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
    textLabel.TextSize = 14
    textLabel.Parent = billboard
    itemEspData[item] = billboard
end

local function clearItemESP()
    for item, billboard in pairs(itemEspData) do
        if billboard then billboard:Destroy() end
    end
    itemEspData = {}
end

ItemESPGroup:AddToggle('ItemESP', {
    Text = '透视道具',
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = '显示医疗包和可乐',
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            local map = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
            if map then
                local ingame = map:FindFirstChild("Ingame")
                if ingame then
                    local medkit = ingame:FindFirstChild("Medkit")
                    if medkit then createItemESP(medkit, "医疗包", Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255)) end
                    local cola = ingame:FindFirstChild("BloxyCola")
                    if cola then createItemESP(cola, "可乐", Color3.fromRGB(131, 111, 255)) end
                end
            end
        else
            clearItemESP()
        end
    end
})

local SettingsGroup = Tabs.Settings:AddLeftGroupbox("菜单")

SettingsGroup:AddButton({ Text = '卸载脚本', Func = function()
    if autoFixConn then autoFixConn:Disconnect() end
    if autoFixTPConn then autoFixTPConn:Disconnect() end
    if blockConn then blockConn:Disconnect() end
    if autoItemConn then autoItemConn:Disconnect() end
    if autoPizzaConn then autoPizzaConn:Disconnect() end
    if staminaConn then staminaConn:Disconnect() end
    if killerAddedConn then killerAddedConn:Disconnect() end
    if survivorAddedConn then survivorAddedConn:Disconnect() end
    if genAddedConn then genAddedConn:Disconnect() end
    clearKillerESP()
    clearSurvivorESP()
    clearGeneratorESP()
    clearItemESP()
    destroyJumpFloat()
    Library:Unload()
end })

SettingsGroup:AddLabel('菜单快捷键'):AddKeyPicker('MenuKeybind', { Default = 'RightShift', NoUI = true, Text = 'Menu keybind' })
Library.ToggleKeybind = Options.MenuKeybind

if ThemeManager then
    ThemeManager:SetLibrary(Library)
    ThemeManager:SetFolder("MyScriptTheme")
    ThemeManager:ApplyToTab(Tabs.Settings)
end

if SaveManager then
    SaveManager:SetLibrary(Library)
    SaveManager:IgnoreThemeSettings()
    SaveManager:SetFolder("MyScriptConfig")
    SaveManager:BuildConfigSection(Tabs.Settings)
end
]===]

ServerScripts["变身躲猫猫"] = [===[
local function safeLoad(url)
    local success, result = pcall(function()
        return loadstring(game:HttpGet(url))()
    end)
    if not success then
        warn("加载失败: " .. url)
        return nil
    end
    return result
end

local Library = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/黑曜石主库.ui")
local ThemeManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/主题管理.ui")
local SaveManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/配置管理.ui")

if not Library then
    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification", {
        Title = "错误",
        Text = "UI 库加载失败，请检查网络或脚本资源",
        Duration = 5,
    })
    return
end

local Window = Library:CreateWindow({
    Title = "变身躲猫猫",
    Footer = "恐拜大帝 制作",
    Icon = 131153193945220,
    NotifySide = "Right",
    ShowCustomCursor = true,
})

Library:Notify("变身躲猫猫脚本 - 创作者：恐拜大帝", 5)

local Tabs = {
    Notice = Window:AddTab("通知", "info"),
    General = Window:AddTab("通用", "settings"),
    Hider = Window:AddTab("躲藏者", "eye"),
    Hunter = Window:AddTab("追捕者", "sword"),
    Settings = Window:AddTab("设置", "settings"),
}

local NoticeGroup = Tabs.Notice:AddLeftGroupbox("作者消息")
NoticeGroup:AddLabel('恐拜大帝将持续更新此脚本')
NoticeGroup:AddLabel('创作者：恐拜大帝')

local GeneralGroup = Tabs.General:AddLeftGroupbox("核心")
GeneralGroup:AddToggle('NoGameToggle', {
    Text = '不会参加游戏',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Interaction.Settings.ToggleAFK:InvokeServer()
    end
})

GeneralGroup:AddButton({ Text = '召唤飞行脚本', Func = function()
    loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/9178/refs/heads/main/fly.lua"))()
end })

GeneralGroup:AddButton({ Text = '传送到跑酷终点1', Func = function()
    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    if player and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-131.6, 106.2, -24.2)
    end
end })

GeneralGroup:AddButton({ Text = '传送到跑酷终点2', Func = function()
    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    if player and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(44.2, 66.8, -399.9)
    end
end })

local MainGroup = Tabs.General:AddRightGroupbox("主要")

local InfiniteJumpEnabled = false
MainGroup:AddToggle('InfiniteJumpToggle', {
    Text = '无限跳',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        InfiniteJumpEnabled = Value
    end
})

game:GetService("UserInputService").JumpRequest:Connect(function()
    if InfiniteJumpEnabled then
        local char = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character
        if char then
            local hum = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
            if hum then
                hum:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
            end
        end
    end
end)

local espEnabled = false
local espBillboards = {}

local function createESP(player)
    if player == game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer then return end
    local char = player.Character
    if not char then return end
    local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not hrp then return end

    if not char:FindFirstChild("EspHighlight") then
        local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
        highlight.Name = "EspHighlight"
        highlight.Parent = char
        highlight.FillTransparency = 0.5
        highlight.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
        highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
        highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0
        highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
    end

    if not hrp:FindFirstChild("EspBillboard") then
        local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        billboard.Name = "EspBillboard"
        billboard.Parent = hrp
        billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 50)
        billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true

        local nameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        nameLabel.Name = "NameLabel"
        nameLabel.Parent = billboard
        nameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        nameLabel.Text = player.Name
        nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
        nameLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
        nameLabel.TextSize = 14
        nameLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold

        local distLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        distLabel.Name = "DistLabel"
        distLabel.Parent = billboard
        distLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        distLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, 0)
        distLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        distLabel.Text = "0m"
        distLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
        distLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
        distLabel.TextSize = 12
        distLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans

        espBillboards[player] = billboard
    end
end

local function removeESP(player)
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        if char:FindFirstChild("EspHighlight") then
            char.EspHighlight:Destroy()
        end
        if char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and char.HumanoidRootPart:FindFirstChild("EspBillboard") then
            char.HumanoidRootPart.EspBillboard:Destroy()
        end
    end
    espBillboards[player] = nil
end

game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    if not espEnabled then return end
    local localPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
    local myChar = localPlayer.Character
    local myPos = myChar and myChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and myChar.HumanoidRootPart.Position

    for player, billboard in pairs(espBillboards) do
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and billboard and billboard.Parent then
            local distLabel = billboard:FindFirstChild("DistLabel")
            if distLabel and myPos then
                local dist = (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - myPos).Magnitude
                distLabel.Text = string.format("%.0fm", dist)
            end
        end
    end
end)

MainGroup:AddToggle('ESPToggle', {
    Text = '透视',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        espEnabled = Value
        if Value then
            for _, p in ipairs(game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()) do
                createESP(p)
            end
        else
            for _, p in ipairs(game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()) do
                removeESP(p)
            end
        end
    end
})

game:GetService("Players").PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
    player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(char)
        char:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if espEnabled then
            createESP(player)
        end
    end)
end)

game:GetService("Players").PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
    removeESP(player)
end)

MainGroup:AddButton({ Text = '甩飞全部玩家', Func = function()
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
    local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
    local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    local count = 0
    for _, targetPlayer in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if targetPlayer ~= LocalPlayer and targetPlayer.Character and targetPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local char = LocalPlayer.Character
            local hum = char and char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
            local root = hum and hum.RootPart
            local tChar = targetPlayer.Character
            local tHum = tChar:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
            local tRoot = tHum and tHum.RootPart
            local tHead = tChar:FindFirstChild("Head")
            local acc = tChar:FindFirstChildOfClass("Accessory")
            local handle = acc and acc:FindFirstChild("Handle")
            if char and hum and root then
                if root.Velocity.Magnitude < 50 then
                    getgenv().OldPos = root.CFrame
                end
                if not getgenv().FPDH then
                    getgenv().FPDH = Workspace.FallenPartsDestroyHeight
                end

                -- 关闭自己和目标的碰撞箱
                for _, part in ipairs(char:GetDescendants()) do
                    if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                        part.CanCollide = false
                    end
                end
                for _, part in ipairs(tChar:GetDescendants()) do
                    if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                        part.CanCollide = false
                    end
                end

                if tHead then
                    Workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = tHead
                elseif not tHead and handle then
                    Workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = handle
                elseif tHum and tRoot then
                    Workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = tHum
                end

                local FPos = function(bp, pos, ang)
                    root.CFrame = CFrame.new(bp.Position) * pos * ang
                    char:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(CFrame.new(bp.Position) * pos * ang)
                    root.Velocity = Vector3.new(9e7, 9e7 * 10, 9e7)
                    root.RotVelocity = Vector3.new(9e8, 9e8, 9e8)
                end

                local SFBasePart = function(bp)
                    local timeout = tick() + 2
                    local angle = 0
                    repeat
                        if root and tHum then
                            -- 持续关闭碰撞
                            for _, part in ipairs(char:GetDescendants()) do
                                if part:IsA("BasePart") then part.CanCollide = false end
                            end
                            for _, part in ipairs(tChar:GetDescendants()) do
                                if part:IsA("BasePart") then part.CanCollide = false end
                            end

                            if bp.Velocity.Magnitude < 50 then
                                angle = angle + 100
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, 1.5, 0) + tHum.MoveDirection * bp.Velocity.Magnitude / 1.25, CFrame.Angles(math.rad(angle), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, -1.5, 0) + tHum.MoveDirection * bp.Velocity.Magnitude / 1.25, CFrame.Angles(math.rad(angle), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(2.25, 1.5, -2.25) + tHum.MoveDirection * bp.Velocity.Magnitude / 1.25, CFrame.Angles(math.rad(angle), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(-2.25, -1.5, 2.25) + tHum.MoveDirection * bp.Velocity.Magnitude / 1.25, CFrame.Angles(math.rad(angle), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, 1.5, 0) + tHum.MoveDirection, CFrame.Angles(math.rad(angle), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, -1.5, 0) + tHum.MoveDirection, CFrame.Angles(math.rad(angle), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                            else
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, 1.5, tHum.WalkSpeed), CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, -1.5, -tHum.WalkSpeed), CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, 1.5, tHum.WalkSpeed), CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, 1.5, tRoot.Velocity.Magnitude / 1.25), CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, -1.5, -tRoot.Velocity.Magnitude / 1.25), CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, 1.5, tRoot.Velocity.Magnitude / 1.25), CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, -1.5, 0), CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, -1.5, 0), CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, -1.5, 0), CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-90), 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                                FPos(bp, CFrame.new(0, -1.5, 0), CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0))
                                task.wait()
                            end
                        else
                            break
                        end
                    until bp.Velocity.Magnitude > 500 or bp.Parent ~= targetPlayer.Character or targetPlayer.Parent ~= Players or targetPlayer.Character ~= tChar or (tHum and tHum.Sit) or hum.Health <= 0 or tick() > timeout
                end

                Workspace.FallenPartsDestroyHeight = 0 / 0
                local bv = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                bv.Name = "EpixVel"
                bv.Parent = root
                bv.Velocity = Vector3.new(9e8, 9e8, 9e8)
                bv.MaxForce = Vector3.new(1 / 0, 1 / 0, 1 / 0)
                hum:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Seated, false)

                if tRoot and tHead then
                    if (tRoot.CFrame.p - tHead.CFrame.p).Magnitude > 5 then
                        SFBasePart(tHead)
                    else
                        SFBasePart(tRoot)
                    end
                elseif tRoot and not tHead then
                    SFBasePart(tRoot)
                elseif not tRoot and tHead then
                    SFBasePart(tHead)
                elseif not tRoot and not tHead and acc and handle then
                    SFBasePart(handle)
                end

                bv:Destroy()
                hum:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Seated, true)
                Workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = hum

                repeat
                    root.CFrame = getgenv().OldPos * CFrame.new(0, 0.5, 0)
                    char:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(getgenv().OldPos * CFrame.new(0, 0.5, 0))
                    hum:ChangeState("GettingUp")
                    for _, x in pairs(char:GetChildren()) do
                        if x:IsA("BasePart") then
                            x.Velocity = Vector3.new()
                            x.RotVelocity = Vector3.new()
                        end
                    end
                    task.wait()
                until (root.Position - getgenv().OldPos.p).Magnitude < 25

                Workspace.FallenPartsDestroyHeight = getgenv().FPDH
                count = count + 1
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
        end
    end
    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification", {Title = "甩飞完成", Text = "共甩飞 " .. tostring(count) .. " 个玩家", Duration = 3})
end })

local HiderGroup = Tabs.Hider:AddLeftGroupbox("躲藏功能")
HiderGroup:AddButton({ Text = '传送到出生点（安全点）', Func = function()
    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    if player and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-10.8, 79.3, 34.1)
    end
end })

local AutoTransformLoop = nil
HiderGroup:AddToggle('AutoTransformToggle', {
    Text = '自动变身',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            AutoTransformLoop = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                pcall(function()
                    local interaction = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Modules.Interaction
                    if interaction:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
                        interaction:FireServer()
                    elseif interaction:IsA("RemoteFunction") then
                        interaction:InvokeServer()
                    elseif interaction:IsA("BindableEvent") then
                        interaction:Fire()
                    elseif interaction:IsA("BindableFunction") then
                        interaction:Invoke()
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(interaction:GetChildren()) do
                        if child:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
                            child:FireServer()
                        elseif child:IsA("RemoteFunction") then
                            child:InvokeServer()
                        elseif child:IsA("BindableEvent") then
                            child:Fire()
                        elseif child:IsA("BindableFunction") then
                            child:Invoke()
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end)
        else
            if AutoTransformLoop then
                AutoTransformLoop:Disconnect()
                AutoTransformLoop = nil
            end
        end
    end
})

local HunterGroup = Tabs.Hunter:AddLeftGroupbox("追捕功能")

local CrazyAttackLoop = nil
HunterGroup:AddToggle('CrazyAttackToggle', {
    Text = '疯狂向前攻击',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            CrazyAttackLoop = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                pcall(function()
                    local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
                    if player and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        local args = {
                            [1] = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart,
                            [2] = Vector3.new(1965.6953125, -10.738676071166992, 1834.8052978515625)
                        }
                        game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Interaction.Gameplay.Zap:FireServer(unpack(args))
                    end
                end)
            end)
        else
            if CrazyAttackLoop then
                CrazyAttackLoop:Disconnect()
                CrazyAttackLoop = nil
            end
        end
    end
})

if not Library then
    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification", {
        Title = "错误",
        Text = "UI 库加载失败，请检查网络或脚本资源",

    return

local Options = Library.Options
local Toggles = Library.Toggles

local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local autoBlastRunning = false
local autoBlastV2Running = false
local blastInterval = 15
local blastV2Interval = 1
local lastBlastTime = 0
local cooldownSeconds = 9
local blastPos = Vector3.new(-14.2, 1.3, 562.5)
local cultivationRunning = false
local cultivationInterval = 0.5

local function isAtBlastPos()
    local char = player.Character
    if not char then return false end
    local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not hrp then return false end
    return (hrp.Position - blastPos).Magnitude < 5
end

local function teleportToBlastPos()
    local char = player.Character
    if not char then return end
    local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not hrp then return end
    hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(blastPos)
end

local function doBlast()
    local now = tick()
    if now - lastBlastTime < cooldownSeconds then
        return
    end
    lastBlastTime = now

    teleportToBlastPos()
    task.wait(0.3)

    ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.RequestBlastStart:FireServer()
    task.wait(0.1)

    local args = { [1] = 4.5176430710125715 }
    ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.RequestBlastRelease:FireServer(unpack(args))
end

local function autoBlastLoop()
    while autoBlastRunning do
        doBlast()
        task.wait(blastInterval)
    end
end

local function autoBlastV2Loop()
    while autoBlastV2Running do
        if not isAtBlastPos() then
            teleportToBlastPos()
            task.wait(0.3)
        end
        local now = tick()
        if now - lastBlastTime >= cooldownSeconds then
            ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.RequestBlastStart:FireServer()
            task.wait(0.1)
            local args = { [1] = 4.5176430710125715 }
            ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.RequestBlastRelease:FireServer(unpack(args))
            lastBlastTime = now
        end
        task.wait(blastV2Interval)
    end
end

local function cultivationLoop()
    while cultivationRunning do
        local args1 = {
            [1] = "4818758418:44866.90683965:2537"
        }
        ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.AuraMultiplierClicked:FireServer(unpack(args1))
        task.wait(0.05)

        local args2 = {
            [1] = "get"
        }
        ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.PlayerSettings:InvokeServer(unpack(args2))
        task.wait(0.05)

        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.GetIndexData:InvokeServer()
        end)

        task.wait(cultivationInterval)
    end
end

BlastGroup:AddButton({ Text = '手动执行Blast并传送', Func = function()

local modelInstanceNames = {
    "ModelInstance", "modelinstance", "MODELINSTANCE",
    "Modelinstance", "modelInstance", "Model_Instance",
    "model_instance", "MODEL_INSTANCE",
    "Model Instance", "model instance", "MODEL INSTANCE",

    "ModelInstanc", "modelinstanc", "MODELINSTANC",
    "ModelInstancE", "modelInstancE",
    "ModelIstance", "modelistance", "MODELISTANCE",
    "ModelIstanse", "modelistanse", "MODELISTANSE",
    "ModelIstence", "modelistence", "MODELISTENCE",
    "ModelIstanc", "modelistanc", "MODELISTANC",
}

local function isModelInstanceName(name)
    for _, variant in ipairs(modelInstanceNames) do
        if name == variant then return true end
    end
    return false
end

local function getItemPart(item)
    if item:IsA("BasePart") then
        return item
    end
    if item:IsA("Model") then
        if item.PrimaryPart then
            return item.PrimaryPart
        end
        for _, child in ipairs(item:GetDescendants()) do
            if child:IsA("BasePart") then
                return child
            end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function updateItemCache()
    cachedItems = {}
    local seen = {}
    for _, obj in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if isModelInstanceName(obj.Name) then
            local item = nil
            if obj:IsA("Model") or obj:IsA("BasePart") then
                item = obj
            elseif obj.Parent and (obj.Parent:IsA("Model") or obj.Parent:IsA("BasePart")) then
                item = obj.Parent
            end
            if item and not seen[item] then
                seen[item] = true
                local part = getItemPart(item)
                if part then
                    table.insert(cachedItems, { Model = item, Part = part })
                end
            end
        end
    end
    cacheUpdateTime = tick()
end

local function getCachedItems()
    if tick() - cacheUpdateTime > 3 then
        updateItemCache()
    end
    return cachedItems
end

local function fireActionable(target)
    pcall(function()
        ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Actionable:FireServer(418)
    end)
    if target then
        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Actionable:FireServer(418, target)
        end)
        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Actionable:FireServer(418, target.Name)
        end)
        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Actionable:FireServer(418, target.Position)
        end)
        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Actionable:FireServer(418, target.CFrame)
        end)
    end
end

local function fireStore(target)
    pcall(function()
        ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Store:FireServer(397)
    end)
    if target then
        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Store:FireServer(397, target)
        end)
        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Store:FireServer(397, target.Name)
        end)
        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Store:FireServer(397, target.Position)
        end)
        pcall(function()
            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Store:FireServer(397, target.CFrame)
        end)
    end
end

local function safeGetMeleeHandler()
    local success, module = pcall(function()
        return require(ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Client"):WaitForChild("Game"):WaitForChild("Melee"):WaitForChild("ClientMeleeHandler"))
    end)
    if success and module then
        ClientMeleeHandler = module
        originalHandler = module._meleeActionHandler
    end
end
safeGetMeleeHandler()

local function Swing()
    if not currentMeleeTool or not currentAttackTime or not currentLookVector then return end
    pcall(function()
        ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.SwingMelee:FireServer(
            currentMeleeTool, currentAttackTime, currentLookVector
        )
    end)
end

if ClientMeleeHandler then
    ClientMeleeHandler._meleeActionHandler = function(actionName, inputState, inputObject)
        if MeleeSpam then
            if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
                local char = LocalPlayer.Character
                if char then
                    currentMeleeTool = char:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Tool")
                    if currentMeleeTool then
                        currentAttackTime = workspace:GetServerTimeNow()
                        local mouse = LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
                        currentLookVector = (mouse.Hit and mouse.Hit.LookVector) or char:GetPivot().LookVector

                        swingThread = task.spawn(function()
                            while MeleeSpam and currentMeleeTool do
                                for i = 1, SwingsPerDelay do
                                    Swing()
                                    task.wait(SwingDelay)
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
            elseif inputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
                if swingThread then
                    task.cancel(swingThread)
                    swingThread = nil
                end
            end
        end

        if not MeleeSpam and originalHandler then
            return originalHandler(actionName, inputState, inputObject)
        end
    end
end

local function translateText(text)
    if not text or text == "" or #text < 2 then
        return nil
    end
    if translatedTexts[text] then
        return translatedTexts[text]
    end
    local success, result = pcall(function()
        local url = "https://translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single?client=gtx&sl=auto&tl=zh-CN&dt=t&q=" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(text)
        local response = game:HttpGet(url)
        local decoded = HttpService:JSONDecode(response)
        if decoded and decoded[1] and decoded[1][1] and decoded[1][1][1] then
            return decoded[1][1][1]
        end
        return nil
    end)
    if success and result then
        translatedTexts[text] = result
        return result
    end
    return nil
end

local function isEnglish(text)
    if not text or text == "" then
        return false
    end
    local englishCount = 0
    local totalCount = 0
    for char in text:gmatch(".") do
        local byte = string.byte(char)
        if byte then
            totalCount = totalCount + 1
            if (byte >= 65 and byte <= 90) or (byte >= 97 and byte <= 122) then
                englishCount = englishCount + 1
            end
        end
    end
    if totalCount == 0 then
        return false
    end
    return (englishCount / totalCount) > 0.5
end

local function processTextObject(textObject)
    if not TranslationEnabled then
        return
    end
    if not textObject:IsA("TextLabel") and not textObject:IsA("TextButton") and not textObject:IsA("TextBox") then
        return
    end
    local originalText = textObject.Text
    if not originalText or originalText == "" then
        return
    end
    if not isEnglish(originalText) then
        return
    end
    local translatedText = translateText(originalText)
    if translatedText and translatedText ~= originalText then
        textObject.Text = translatedText
    end
end

local function scanAndTranslate(parent)
    if not TranslationEnabled then
        return
    end
    for _, descendant in pairs(parent:GetDescendants()) do
        if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") or descendant:IsA("TextButton") or descendant:IsA("TextBox") then
            task.spawn(function()
                processTextObject(descendant)
            end)
        end
    end
end

local function onDescendantAdded(descendant)
    if not TranslationEnabled then
        return
    end
    if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") or descendant:IsA("TextButton") or descendant:IsA("TextBox") then
        task.delay(0.1, function()
            processTextObject(descendant)
        end)
    end
end

local function startTranslation()
    if playerGuiConnection then
        playerGuiConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    if coreGuiConnection then
        coreGuiConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    if heartbeatConnection then
        heartbeatConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    local PlayerGui = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
    playerGuiConnection = PlayerGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(onDescendantAdded)
    coreGuiConnection = CoreGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(onDescendantAdded)
    lastScanTime = tick()
    scanInterval = 1.5 / TranslationSpeed
    heartbeatConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        if not TranslationEnabled then
            return
        end
        local currentTime = tick()
        if currentTime - lastScanTime >= scanInterval then
            lastScanTime = currentTime
            task.spawn(function()
                scanAndTranslate(PlayerGui)
            end)
            pcall(function()
                for _, gui in pairs(CoreGui:GetChildren()) do
                    if gui:IsA("ScreenGui") then
                        task.spawn(function()
                            scanAndTranslate(gui)
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end)
    scanAndTranslate(PlayerGui)
    pcall(function()
        for _, gui in pairs(CoreGui:GetChildren()) do
            if gui:IsA("ScreenGui") then
                scanAndTranslate(gui)
            end
        end
    end)
end

local function stopTranslation()
    if playerGuiConnection then
        playerGuiConnection:Disconnect()
        playerGuiConnection = nil
    end
    if coreGuiConnection then
        coreGuiConnection:Disconnect()
        coreGuiConnection = nil
    end
    if heartbeatConnection then
        heartbeatConnection:Disconnect()
        heartbeatConnection = nil
    end
end

local AutoAttackGroup = Tabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("自动攻击")
AutoAttackGroup:AddToggle('AutoAttack', {
    Text = '自动攻击',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoAttack = true
        autoAttackThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoAttack do
                local char = LocalPlayer.Character
                if char then
                    local tool = char:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Tool")
                    if tool then
                        local attackTime = workspace:GetServerTimeNow()
                        local lookVector = char:GetPivot().LookVector
                        pcall(function()
                            ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.SwingMelee:FireServer(
                                tool, attackTime, lookVector
                            )
                        end)
                    end
                end
                task.wait(AutoAttackDelay)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动攻击已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoAttack = false
        if autoAttackThread then
            task.cancel(autoAttackThread)
            autoAttackThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("自动攻击已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

    Text = '攻击频率',
    Default = 0.05,
    Min = 0.001,
    Max = 0.5,
    Rounding = 3,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    AutoAttackDelay = value
end)

local JumpGroup = Tabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("二段跳")
JumpGroup:AddToggle('DoubleJump', {
    Text = '二段跳（不回拉）',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        DoubleJump = true
        jumpCount = 0
        lastJumpTime = 0
        Library:Notify("二段跳已启用", 2)
    else
        DoubleJump = false
        jumpCount = 0
        Library:Notify("二段跳已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

UserInputService.JumpRequest:Connect(function()
    if not DoubleJump then return end
    local char = LocalPlayer.Character
    if not char then return end
    local hum = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not hum or not hrp then return end

    local now = tick()
    if hum.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air then
        jumpCount = 0
    end

    if jumpCount < 1 then
        jumpCount = jumpCount + 1
        lastJumpTime = now
    elseif jumpCount == 1 and (now - lastJumpTime) < 1.5 then
        jumpCount = jumpCount + 1
        hrp.Velocity = Vector3.new(hrp.Velocity.X, 50, hrp.Velocity.Z)
    end
end)

local BringGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("拉取物品")
BringGroup:AddToggle('BringItems', {
    Text = '拉取全图物品（疑似没有用）',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        BringItems = true
        collectedItems = {}
        itemsBrought = 0
        totalItems = 0
        updateItemCache()
        totalItems = #cachedItems

        bringThread = task.spawn(function()
            while BringItems do
                local char = LocalPlayer.Character
                local root = char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if root then
                    local items = getCachedItems()
                    local closest = nil
                    local closestDist = math.huge

                    for _, item in ipairs(items) do
                        if not collectedItems[item.Model] then
                            local dist = (item.Part.Position - root.Position).Magnitude
                            if dist < closestDist then
                                closestDist = dist
                                closest = item
                            end
                        end
                    end

                    if closest then
                        collectedItems[closest.Model] = true
                        itemsBrought = itemsBrought + 1

                        for i = 1, 2 do
                            fireStore(closest.Part)
                            task.wait(0.05)
                        end

                        if itemsBrought % 10 == 0 then
                            Library:Notify(itemsBrought .. "/" .. totalItems, 2)
                        end
                    else
                        task.wait(0.5)
                    end
                else
                    task.wait(0.1)
                end
                task.wait(BringDelay)
            end
        end)

        Library:Notify("拉取全图物品已启用 发现" .. totalItems .. "个", 2)
    else
        BringItems = false
        if bringThread then
            task.cancel(bringThread)
            bringThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("拉取全图物品已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

BringGroup:AddSlider('BringDelay', {
    Text = '拉取速度',
    Default = 0.1,
    Min = 0.01,
    Max = 2,
    Rounding = 2,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    BringDelay = value
end)

local InteractGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("自动交互")
InteractGroup:AddToggle('AutoInteract', {
    Text = '自动交互（点购买）',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoInteract = true
        updateItemCache()
        autoInteractThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoInteract do
                local char = LocalPlayer.Character
                local root = char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                local target = nil
                local closestDist = math.huge

                if root then
                    local items = getCachedItems()
                    for _, item in ipairs(items) do
                        local dist = (item.Part.Position - root.Position).Magnitude
                        if dist < closestDist then
                            closestDist = dist
                            target = item.Part
                        end
                    end
                end

                fireActionable(target)
                task.wait(0.05)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动交互已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoInteract = false
        if autoInteractThread then
            task.cancel(autoInteractThread)
            autoInteractThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("自动交互已关闭", 2)
    end
end)
