local SpeedGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("修改移速")
SpeedGroup:AddSlider('WalkSpeed', {
    Text = '移速',
    Default = 16,
    Min = 5,
    Max = 20,
    Rounding = 0,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    WalkSpeed = value
    local char = LocalPlayer.Character
    if char then
        local hum = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if hum then
            hum.WalkSpeed = value
        end
    end
    if speedThread then
        task.cancel(speedThread)
        speedThread = nil
    end
    speedThread = task.spawn(function()
        while true do
            local c = LocalPlayer.Character
            if c then
                local h = c:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if h and h.WalkSpeed ~= WalkSpeed then
                    h.WalkSpeed = WalkSpeed
                end
            end
            task.wait(0.1)
        end
    end)
    Library:Notify("移速已设置为 " .. value, 2)
end)

local NightVisionGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("夜视")
NightVisionGroup:AddToggle('NightVision', {
    Text = '夜视',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        NightVision = true
        nightVisionThread = task.spawn(function()
            while NightVision do
                Lighting.Ambient = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                Lighting.ColorShift_Bottom = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                Lighting.ColorShift_Top = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                Lighting.FogEnd = 100000
                Lighting.FogStart = 100000
                Lighting.Brightness = 1
                Lighting.GlobalShadows = false
                Lighting.OutdoorAmbient = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                Lighting.ClockTime = 12
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("夜视已启用", 2)
    else
        NightVision = false
        if nightVisionThread then
            task.cancel(nightVisionThread)
            nightVisionThread = nil
        end
        Lighting.Ambient = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
        Lighting.ColorShift_Bottom = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
        Lighting.ColorShift_Top = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
        Lighting.FogEnd = 1000
        Lighting.FogStart = 0
        Lighting.Brightness = 1
        Lighting.GlobalShadows = true
        Lighting.OutdoorAmbient = Color3.new(0.7, 0.7, 0.7)
        Library:Notify("夜视已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

local FuelGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("火车燃料")
FuelGroup:AddToggle('FuelGuiEnabled', {
    Text = '显示燃油状态',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        FuelGuiEnabled = true
        if not fuelGui then
            fuelGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
            fuelGui.Name = "FuelGui"
            fuelGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
            fuelGui.Parent = CoreGui
            local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
            label.Name = "FuelLabel"
            label.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
            label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
            label.BorderColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
            label.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, -100)
            label.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 50)
            label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold
            label.Text = "燃料: 0 / 240"
            label.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
            label.TextScaled = true
            label.TextSize = 14
            label.TextWrapped = true
            label.Parent = fuelGui
        end
        fuelGui.Enabled = true
        fuelThread = task.spawn(function()
            while FuelGuiEnabled do
                pcall(function()
                    local train = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Train")
                    if train then
                        local fuel = train:FindFirstChild("Fuel")
                        if fuel then
                            local fuelValue = fuel.Value
                            fuelGui.FuelLabel.Text = "燃料: " .. fuelValue .. " / 240"
                            if fuelValue <= 50 then
                                fuelGui.FuelLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
                            elseif fuelValue <= 150 then
                                fuelGui.FuelLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 165/255, 0)
                            else
                                fuelGui.FuelLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 0)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("燃油状态显示已启用", 2)
    else
        FuelGuiEnabled = false
        if fuelThread then
            task.cancel(fuelThread)
            fuelThread = nil
        end
        if fuelGui then
            fuelGui.Enabled = false
        end
        Library:Notify("燃油状态显示已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

local MonsterGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("怪物预知")
MonsterGroup:AddToggle('MonsterPredict', {
    Text = '预知今晚怪物',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        MonsterPredict = true
        lastMonsterCount = 0
        monsterPredictThread = task.spawn(function()
            while MonsterPredict do
                local nightEnemies = Workspace:FindFirstChild("NightEnemies")
                local currentCount = 0
                local monsterName = "未知"
                if nightEnemies then
                    currentCount = #nightEnemies:GetChildren()
                    for _, v in ipairs(nightEnemies:GetChildren()) do
                        if v:IsA("Model") then
                            monsterName = v.Name
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
                if currentCount > 0 and lastMonsterCount == 0 then
                    local displayName = monsterName
                    if monsterName == "Wolf" then
                        displayName = "狼"
                    elseif monsterName == "Werewolf" then
                        displayName = "狼人"
                    elseif monsterName == "Vampire" then
                        displayName = "吸血鬼"
                    elseif monsterName == "Walker" then
                        displayName = "正常僵尸"
                    elseif monsterName == "Runner" then
                        displayName = "奔跑僵尸"
                    end
                    StarterGui:SetCore("SendNotification", {
                        Title = "怪物预知",
                        Text = "今晚的怪物是：" .. displayName,
                        Icon = "rbxthumb://type=Asset&id=17366451283&w=150&h=150",
                        Duration = 15,
                    })
                end
                lastMonsterCount = currentCount
                task.wait(2)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("怪物预知已启用", 2)
    else
        MonsterPredict = false
        if monsterPredictThread then
            task.cancel(monsterPredictThread)
            monsterPredictThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("怪物预知已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

local AutoLeft = Tabs.Auto:AddLeftGroupbox("自动收集")
local AutoRight = Tabs.Auto:AddRightGroupbox("自动操作")

AutoLeft:AddToggle('AutoStore', {
    Text = '自动收物品',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoStore = true
        autoStoreThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoStore do
                local runtimeItems = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RuntimeItems")
                if runtimeItems then
                    for _, item in ipairs(runtimeItems:GetChildren()) do
                        if item:IsA("Model") then
                            pcall(function()
                                ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild("StoreItem"):FireServer(item)
                            end)
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动收物品已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoStore = false
        if autoStoreThread then
            task.cancel(autoStoreThread)
            autoStoreThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("自动收物品已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

AutoLeft:AddToggle('AutoCollectBond', {
    Text = '自动收集债券',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoCollectBond = true
        autoCollectBondThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoCollectBond do
                local runtimeItems = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RuntimeItems")
                if runtimeItems then
                    for _, v in ipairs(runtimeItems:GetChildren()) do
                        if v.Name == "Bond" then
                            local char = LocalPlayer.Character
                            local hrp = char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            if hrp then
                                local dist = (hrp.Position - v.Position).Magnitude
                                if dist < 10 then
                                    pcall(function()
                                        ReplicatedStorage.Packages.ActivateObjectClient:FireServer(v)
                                    end)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动收集债券已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoCollectBond = false
        if autoCollectBondThread then
            task.cancel(autoCollectBondThread)
            autoCollectBondThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("自动收集债券已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

AutoLeft:AddToggle('AutoCollectItem', {
    Text = '自动收集物品',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoCollectItem = true
        autoCollectItemThread = task.spawn(function()

                                    ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.Tool.PickUpTool:FireServer(v)

                            end
                        end

                end

AutoLeft:AddToggle('AutoCollectMoneybag', {
    Text = '自动收集钱袋',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoCollectMoneybag = true
        autoCollectMoneybagThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoCollectMoneybag do
                local runtimeItems = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RuntimeItems")
                if runtimeItems and runtimeItems:FindFirstChild("Moneybag") then
                    local moneybag = runtimeItems.Moneybag
                    local collectPrompt = moneybag:FindFirstChild("MoneyBag") and moneybag.MoneyBag:FindFirstChild("CollectPrompt")
                    if collectPrompt then
                        pcall(function()
                            fireproximityprompt(collectPrompt)
                        end)
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动收集钱袋已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoCollectMoneybag = false
        if autoCollectMoneybagThread then
            task.cancel(autoCollectMoneybagThread)
            autoCollectMoneybagThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("自动收集钱袋已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

AutoLeft:AddToggle('AutoWalkBond', {
    Text = '自动走向债券',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoWalkBond = true
        autoWalkBondThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoWalkBond do
                local char = LocalPlayer.Character
                local hum = char and char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if hum then
                    local runtimeItems = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RuntimeItems")
                    if runtimeItems then
                        for _, item in ipairs(runtimeItems:GetChildren()) do
                            if item.Name == "Bond" and item:IsA("Model") then
                                hum.WalkToPoint = Vector3.new(item.Position.X, item.Position.Y, item.Position.Z)
                                break
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动走向债券已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoWalkBond = false
        if autoWalkBondThread then
            task.cancel(autoWalkBondThread)
            autoWalkBondThread = nil
        end
        local char = LocalPlayer.Character
        local hum = char and char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if hum then
            local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if hrp then
                hum.WalkToPoint = hrp.Position
            end
        end
        Library:Notify("自动走向债券已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

AutoRight:AddToggle('AutoEndGame', {
    Text = '自动拉终点开关',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoEndGame = true
        autoEndGameThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoEndGame do
                pcall(function()
                    local baseplates = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Baseplates")
                    if not baseplates then return end
                    local final = baseplates:FindFirstChild("FinalBasePlate")
                    if not final then return end
                    local outlaw = final:FindFirstChild("OutlawBase")
                    if not outlaw then return end
                    local bridge = outlaw:FindFirstChild("Bridge")
                    if not bridge then return end
                    local control = bridge:FindFirstChild("BridgeControl")
                    if not control then return end
                    local crank = control:FindFirstChild("Crank")
                    if not crank then return end
                    local model = crank:FindFirstChild("Model")
                    if not model then return end
                    local mid = model:FindFirstChild("Mid")
                    if not mid then return end
                    local endGame = mid:FindFirstChild("EndGame")
                    if endGame and endGame:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
                        endGame.MaxActivationDistance = math.huge
                        fireproximityprompt(endGame)
                    end
                end)
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动拉终点开关已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoEndGame = false
        if autoEndGameThread then
            task.cancel(autoEndGameThread)
            autoEndGameThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("自动拉终点开关已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

AutoRight:AddToggle('AutoTrainHorn', {
    Text = '自动火车鸣声',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoTrainHorn = true
        autoTrainHornThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoTrainHorn do
                pcall(function()
                    local train = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Train")
                    if not train then return end
                    local controls = train:FindFirstChild("TrainControls")
                    if not controls then return end
                    local lever = controls:FindFirstChild("Lever")
                    if not lever then return end
                    local hitbox = lever:FindFirstChild("HitBox")
                    if not hitbox then return end
                    local clickDetector = hitbox:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector")
                    if clickDetector then
                        clickDetector.MaxActivationDistance = math.huge
                        fireclickdetector(clickDetector)
                    end
                end)
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动火车鸣声已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoTrainHorn = false
        if autoTrainHornThread then
            task.cancel(autoTrainHornThread)
            autoTrainHornThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("自动火车鸣声已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

AutoRight:AddToggle('AutoBandage', {
    Text = '自动使用绷带',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoBandage = true
        autoBandageThread = task.spawn(function()
            while AutoBandage do
                local char = LocalPlayer.Character
                local hum = char and char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if hum and hum.Health <= BandageHealth then
                    local backpack = LocalPlayer.Backpack
                    for _, v in ipairs(backpack:GetChildren()) do
                        if v.Name == "Bandage" then
                            pcall(function()
                                v.Parent = char
                                local bandage = char:FindFirstChild("Bandage")
                                if bandage and bandage:FindFirstChild("Use") then
                                    bandage.Use:FireServer()
                                end
                            end)
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("自动使用绷带已启用", 2)
    else
        AutoBandage = false
        if autoBandageThread then
            task.cancel(autoBandageThread)
            autoBandageThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("自动使用绷带已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

AutoRight:AddSlider('BandageHealth', {
    Text = '使用绷带血量',
    Default = 30,
    Min = 1,
    Max = 100,
    Rounding = 0,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    BandageHealth = value
end)

local ESPLeft = Tabs.ESP:AddLeftGroupbox("环境透视")
local ESPRight = Tabs.ESP:AddRightGroupbox("敌人透视")

local function createBillboard(parent, text, color)
    if parent:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui") then return end
    local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
    billboard.Name = "BillboardGui"
    billboard.Parent = parent
    billboard.Adornee = parent
    billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
    billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
    billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
    local nameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    nameLabel.Parent = billboard
    nameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    nameLabel.Text = text
    nameLabel.TextColor3 = color
    nameLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
    nameLabel.TextScaled = true
end

ESPLeft:AddToggle('ESPItems', {
    Text = '透视物品',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        ESPItems = true
        local runtimeItems = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RuntimeItems")
        if runtimeItems then
            for _, v in ipairs(runtimeItems:GetChildren()) do
                if v:IsA("Model") then
                    createBillboard(v, v.Name, Color3.new(255, 215, 0))
                end
            end
        end
        espItemsConn = Workspace.RuntimeItems.ChildAdded:Connect(function(v)
            if ESPItems and v:IsA("Model") then
                createBillboard(v, v.Name, Color3.new(255, 215, 0))
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("透视物品已启用", 2)
    else
        ESPItems = false
        if espItemsConn then
            espItemsConn:Disconnect()
            espItemsConn = nil
        end
        local runtimeItems = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RuntimeItems")
        if runtimeItems then
            for _, v in ipairs(runtimeItems:GetChildren()) do
                local bill = v:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui")
                if bill then bill:Destroy() end
            end
        end
        Library:Notify("透视物品已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

ESPRight:AddToggle('ESPZombie', {
    Text = '房子中的怪物透视',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        ESPZombie = true
        local buildings = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RandomBuildings")
        if buildings then
            for _, building in ipairs(buildings:GetChildren()) do
                local standalone = building:FindFirstChild("StandaloneZombiePart")
                if standalone then
                    local zombies = standalone:FindFirstChild("Zombies")
                    if zombies then
                        for _, zombie in ipairs(zombies:GetChildren()) do
                            if zombie:IsA("Model") then
                                createBillboard(zombie, zombie.Name, Color3.new(0, 255, 0))
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        espZombieConn = Workspace.RandomBuildings.ChildAdded:Connect(function(building)
            if not ESPZombie then return end
            task.wait(0.5)
            local standalone = building:FindFirstChild("StandaloneZombiePart")
            if standalone then
                local zombies = standalone:FindFirstChild("Zombies")
                if zombies then
                    for _, zombie in ipairs(zombies:GetChildren()) do
                        if zombie:IsA("Model") then
                            createBillboard(zombie, zombie.Name, Color3.new(0, 255, 0))
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("房子中的怪物透视已启用", 2)
    else
        ESPZombie = false
        if espZombieConn then
            espZombieConn:Disconnect()
            espZombieConn = nil
        end
        local buildings = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RandomBuildings")
        if buildings then
            for _, building in ipairs(buildings:GetChildren()) do
                local standalone = building:FindFirstChild("StandaloneZombiePart")
                if standalone then
                    local zombies = standalone:FindFirstChild("Zombies")
                    if zombies then
                        for _, zombie in ipairs(zombies:GetChildren()) do
                            local bill = zombie:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui")
                            if bill then bill:Destroy() end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        Library:Notify("房子中的怪物透视已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

}):OnChanged(function(value)

        ESPOutlaw = true

                local bill = v:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui")
                if bill then bill:Destroy() end

    end
end)

local InteractLeft = Tabs.Interact:AddLeftGroupbox("交互修改")
local InteractRight = Tabs.Interact:AddRightGroupbox("环境清理")

InteractLeft:AddToggle('InstantInteract', {
    Text = '秒交互',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    InstantInteract = value
    for _, v in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
            if value then
                oldPromptDurations[v] = v.HoldDuration
                v.HoldDuration = 0
            else
                if oldPromptDurations[v] ~= nil then
                    v.HoldDuration = oldPromptDurations[v]
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if value then
        Library:Notify("秒交互已启用", 2)
    else
        Library:Notify("秒交互已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

InteractLeft:AddToggle('RemoteInteract', {
    Text = '远程交互',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    RemoteInteract = value
    for _, v in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
            if value then
                oldPromptDistances[v] = v.MaxActivationDistance
                v.MaxActivationDistance = math.huge
            else
                if oldPromptDistances[v] ~= nil then
                    v.MaxActivationDistance = oldPromptDistances[v]
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if value then
        Library:Notify("远程交互已启用", 2)
    else
        Library:Notify("远程交互已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

InteractLeft:AddToggle('NoLOSInteract', {
    Text = '无视野互动',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    NoLOSInteract = value
    for _, v in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
            if value then
                oldPromptLOS[v] = v.RequiresLineOfSight
                v.RequiresLineOfSight = false
            else
                if oldPromptLOS[v] ~= nil then
                    v.RequiresLineOfSight = oldPromptLOS[v]
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if value then
        Library:Notify("无视野互动已启用", 2)
    else
        Library:Notify("无视野互动已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

InteractRight:AddButton("删除杂物", function()
    local decor = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Decor")
    if decor then
        for _, v in ipairs(decor:GetChildren()) do
            v:Destroy()
        end
    end
    Library:Notify("杂物已删除", 2)
end)

InteractRight:AddToggle('DeleteDecor', {
    Text = '持续删除杂物',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        DeleteDecor = true
        deleteDecorThread = task.spawn(function()
            while DeleteDecor do
                local decor = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Decor")
                if decor then
                    for _, v in ipairs(decor:GetChildren()) do
                        v:Destroy()
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("持续删除杂物已启用", 2)
    else
        DeleteDecor = false
        if deleteDecorThread then
            task.cancel(deleteDecorThread)
            deleteDecorThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("持续删除杂物已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

InteractRight:AddButton("删除闪电", function()
    for _, v in ipairs(Workspace:GetChildren()) do
        if v.Name == "LightningModel" then
            v:Destroy()
        end
    end
    Library:Notify("闪电已删除", 2)
end)

InteractRight:AddToggle('DeleteLightning', {
    Text = '持续删除闪电',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        DeleteLightning = true
        deleteLightningThread = task.spawn(function()
            while DeleteLightning do
                for _, v in ipairs(Workspace:GetChildren()) do
                    if v.Name == "LightningModel" then
                        v:Destroy()
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("持续删除闪电已启用", 2)
    else
        DeleteLightning = false
        if deleteLightningThread then
            task.cancel(deleteLightningThread)
            deleteLightningThread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("持续删除闪电已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

local BondGroup = Tabs.Bond:AddLeftGroupbox("刷债券")
BondGroup:AddButton("启动刷债券脚本", function()
    TranslationEnabled = true
    TranslationSpeed = 5
    scanInterval = 0.3
    startTranslation()
    pcall(function()
        loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/afkar-gg/sc/refs/heads/main/auto-bond"))()
    end)
    Library:Notify("刷债券脚本已启动，自动翻译已开启（速度5）", 3)
end)

local AutoBondV2 = false
local autoBondV2Thread = nil

BondGroup:AddToggle('AutoBondV2', {
    Text = '刷债券脚本v2（不会死）',
    Default = false,
}):OnChanged(function(value)
    if value then
        AutoBondV2 = true
        autoBondV2Thread = task.spawn(function()
            local RS = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
            local world = require(RS.Shared.Universe.ECS.world)
            local comps = require(RS.Shared.Universe.ECS.components)
            local replicator = require(RS.Client.Universe.Replication.clientReplicator)
            local Remotes = require(RS.Shared.Universe.Remotes)
            local PlayerData = require(RS.Client.Universe.PlayerDataController)
            local Event = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Shared.Universe.Network.RemoteEvent.Actionable
            while AutoBondV2 do
                local char = world:get_resource(comps.ClientStateResource).localCharacter
                if char then
                    if not world:has(char, comps.Sack) then
                        world:add(char, comps.Sack)
                        world:set(char, comps.Sack, { contents = {}, maxContents = 10 })
                    end
                    for id = 1, 100000 do
                        if world:has(id, comps.Storable) and world:get(id, comps.ObjectId) == "bond" then
                            local sr = replicator:get_server_entity(id)
                            if sr and sr ~= id then
                                Remotes.Store:FireServer(sr)
                                Remotes.Store:FireServer()
                                Event:FireServer(sr)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
        Library:Notify("刷债券脚本v2已启动（不会死）", 3)
    else
        AutoBondV2 = false
        if autoBondV2Thread then
            task.cancel(autoBondV2Thread)
            autoBondV2Thread = nil
        end
        Library:Notify("刷债券脚本v2已关闭", 2)
    end
end)

local UnloadGroup = Tabs.Settings:AddLeftGroupbox("脚本管理")
UnloadGroup:AddButton("卸载脚本", function()
    Library:Unload()
end)

if ThemeManager then
    ThemeManager:SetLibrary(Library)
    ThemeManager:SetFolder("DeadRailTheme")
    ThemeManager:ApplyToTab(Tabs.Settings)
end

if SaveManager then
    SaveManager:SetLibrary(Library)
    SaveManager:IgnoreThemeSettings()
    SaveManager:SetFolder("DeadRailConfig")
    SaveManager:BuildConfigSection(Tabs.Settings)
end
]===]

ServerScripts["自然灾害"] = [===[
local function safeLoad(url)
    local success, result = pcall(function()
        return loadstring(game:HttpGet(url))()
    end)
    if not success then
        warn("加载失败: " .. url)
        return nil
    end
    return result
end

local Library = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/黑曜石主库.ui")
local ThemeManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/主题管理.ui")
local SaveManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/配置管理.ui")

if not Library then
    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification", {
        Title = "错误",
        Text = "UI 库加载失败，请检查网络或脚本资源",
        Duration = 5,
    })
    return
end

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local Window = Library:CreateWindow({
    Title = "自然灾害",
    Footer = "恐拜大帝 制作",
    Icon = 131153193945220,
    NotifySide = "Right",
    ShowCustomCursor = true,
})

Library:Notify({
    Title = "自然灾害",
    Description = "创作者：恐拜大帝\nQQ：3999698324\n脚本已加载成功",
    Time = 5,
})

local Tabs = {
    Notice = Window:AddTab("通知", "info"),
    Main = Window:AddTab("主要", "info"),
    BlackHole = Window:AddTab("黑洞", "zap"),
    Command = Window:AddTab("指令", "terminal"),
    MindPower = Window:AddTab("念力", "wind"),
    Teleport = Window:AddTab("传送", "map"),
    Settings = Window:AddTab("设置", "settings"),
}

local NoticeGroup = Tabs.Notice:AddLeftGroupbox("作者消息")
NoticeGroup:AddLabel("恐拜大帝将持续更新此脚本")
NoticeGroup:AddLabel("创作者：恐拜大帝")

local VirtualUserService = game:GetService("VirtualUser")
player.Idled:Connect(function()
    VirtualUserService:Button2Down(Vector2.new(0, 0), workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame)
    task.wait(1)
    VirtualUserService:Button2Up(Vector2.new(0, 0), workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame)
end)

local MainLeft = Tabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("灾害生存")
local MainRight = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("辅助功能")

MainLeft:AddToggle("AutoWin", {
    Text = "自动存活",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        _G.autowinfarm = Value
        task.spawn(function()
            while _G.autowinfarm do
                pcall(function()
                    player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-236, 180, 360, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1)
                end)
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    end
})

MainLeft:AddLabel("当前灾难: 无")

local DisasterDetectionEnabled = false
local LastDisasterType = ""

MainLeft:AddToggle("DisasterDetect", {
    Text = "预测灾害文字显示",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        DisasterDetectionEnabled = Value
        LastDisasterType = ""
        task.spawn(function()
            while DisasterDetectionEnabled do
                pcall(function()
                    local PlayerDisplayName = player.DisplayName
                    local PlayerWorkspaceModel = workspace:FindFirstChild(PlayerDisplayName)
                    if PlayerWorkspaceModel then
                        local SurvivalTagValue = PlayerWorkspaceModel:FindFirstChild("SurvivalTag")
                        if SurvivalTagValue then
                            local DisasterEnglishName = SurvivalTagValue.Value
                            local map = {
                                Blizzard = "暴风雪",
                                Sandstorm = "沙尘暴",
                                Tornado = "龙卷风",
                                ["Volcanic Eruption"] = "火山",
                                ["Flash Flood"] = "洪水",
                                ["Deadly Virus"] = "病毒",
                                Tsunami = "海啸",
                                ["Acid Rain"] = "酸雨",
                                Fire = "火焰",
                                ["Meteor Shower"] = "流星雨",
                                Earthquake = "地震",
                                ["Thunder Storm"] = "暴风雨",
                            }
                            local DisasterChineseName = map[DisasterEnglishName] or "未知灾难"
                            if DisasterEnglishName ~= LastDisasterType then
                                LastDisasterType = DisasterEnglishName
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    end
})

local NotificationDisasterEnabled = false
local LastNotificationDisaster = ""

MainLeft:AddToggle("DisasterNotify", {
    Text = "预测灾害通知提醒",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        NotificationDisasterEnabled = Value
        if Value then
            Library:Notify({
                Title = "自然灾害",
                Description = "预测灾害 已开启",
                Time = 3,
            })
        else
            Library:Notify({
                Title = "自然灾害",
                Description = "预测灾害 已关闭",
                Time = 3,
            })
        end
        LastNotificationDisaster = ""
        task.spawn(function()
            while NotificationDisasterEnabled do
                pcall(function()
                    local PlayerDisplayName = player.DisplayName
                    local PlayerWorkspaceModel = workspace:FindFirstChild(PlayerDisplayName)
                    local SurvivalTagValue = PlayerWorkspaceModel and PlayerWorkspaceModel:FindFirstChild("SurvivalTag")
                    if SurvivalTagValue then
                        local DisasterEnglishName = SurvivalTagValue.Value
                        local map = {
                            Blizzard = "本局灾害：暴风雪",
                            Sandstorm = "本局灾害：沙尘暴",
                            Tornado = "本局灾害：龙卷风",
                            ["Volcanic Eruption"] = "本局灾害：火山",
                            ["Flash Flood"] = "本局灾害：洪水",
                            ["Deadly Virus"] = "本局灾害：病毒",
                            Tsunami = "本局灾害：海啸",
                            ["Acid Rain"] = "本局灾害：酸雨",
                            Fire = "本局灾害：火焰",
                            ["Meteor Shower"] = "本局灾害：流星雨",
                            Earthquake = "本局灾害：地震",
                            ["Thunder Storm"] = "本局灾害：暴风雨",
                        }
                        local DisasterNotificationText = map[DisasterEnglishName] or ""
                        if DisasterNotificationText ~= "" and DisasterEnglishName ~= LastNotificationDisaster then
                            Library:Notify({
                                Title = "自然灾害",
                                Description = DisasterNotificationText,
                                Time = 3,
                            })
                            LastNotificationDisaster = DisasterEnglishName
                        end
                    end
                end)
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    end
})

local ChatDisasterEnabled = false
local LastChatDisaster = ""

local function SendChatMessage(MessageText)
    if TextChatService.ChatVersion ~= Enum.ChatVersion.TextChatService then
        ReplicatedStorage.DefaultChatSystemChatEvents.SayMessageRequest:FireServer(MessageText, "All")
    else
        TextChatService.TextChannels.RBXGeneral:SendAsync(MessageText)
    end
end

MainLeft:AddToggle("DisasterChat", {
    Text = "预测灾害聊天通知",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        ChatDisasterEnabled = Value
        LastChatDisaster = ""
        task.spawn(function()
            while ChatDisasterEnabled do
                pcall(function()
                    local PlayerDisplayName = player.DisplayName
                    local PlayerWorkspaceModel = workspace:FindFirstChild(PlayerDisplayName)
                    local SurvivalTagValue = PlayerWorkspaceModel and PlayerWorkspaceModel:FindFirstChild("SurvivalTag")
                    if SurvivalTagValue then
                        local DisasterEnglishName = SurvivalTagValue.Value
                        local map = {
                            Blizzard = "暴风雪",
                            Sandstorm = "沙尘暴",
                            Tornado = "龙卷风",
                            ["Volcanic Eruption"] = "火山",
                            ["Flash Flood"] = "洪水",
                            ["Deadly Virus"] = "病毒",
                            Tsunami = "海啸",
                            ["Acid Rain"] = "酸雨",
                            Fire = "火焰",
                            ["Meteor Shower"] = "流星雨",
                            Earthquake = "地震",
                            ["Thunder Storm"] = "暴风雨",
                        }
                        local DisasterChineseName = map[DisasterEnglishName] or "未知灾难"
                        if DisasterEnglishName ~= LastChatDisaster then
                            SendChatMessage("当前灾难: " .. DisasterChineseName)
                            LastChatDisaster = DisasterEnglishName
                        end
                    end
                end)
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    end
})

local NoClipConnection = nil

MainLeft:AddToggle("NoClip", {
    Text = "防穿飞",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            NoClipConnection = RunService.Stepped:Connect(function()
                pcall(function()
                    for _, v in pairs(player.Character:GetDescendants()) do
                        if v:IsA("BasePart") then
                            v.CanCollide = false
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end)
        else
            if NoClipConnection then
                NoClipConnection:Disconnect()
                NoClipConnection = nil
            end
            pcall(function()
                for _, v in pairs(player.Character:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("BasePart") then
                        v.CanCollide = true
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

local FallDamageConnection = nil
local CharacterAddedConnection = nil

local function SetupFallDamageProtection(Character)
    pcall(function()
        local HumanoidRootPart = Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if FallDamageConnection then
            FallDamageConnection:Disconnect()
        end
        FallDamageConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            pcall(function()
                if HumanoidRootPart.Parent then
                    local CurrentVelocity = HumanoidRootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity
                    HumanoidRootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
                    RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
                    HumanoidRootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = CurrentVelocity
                else
                    FallDamageConnection:Disconnect()
                    FallDamageConnection = nil
                end
            end)
        end)
    end)
end

MainLeft:AddToggle("FallDamage", {
    Text = "刹除跌落伤害",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            pcall(function()
                SetupFallDamageProtection(player.Character)
            end)
            if not CharacterAddedConnection then
                CharacterAddedConnection = player.CharacterAdded:Connect(SetupFallDamageProtection)
            end
            Library:Notify({
                Title = "自然灾害",
                Description = "刹除跌落伤害 已开启",
                Time = 3,
            })
        else
            if FallDamageConnection then
                FallDamageConnection:Disconnect()
                FallDamageConnection = nil
            end
            if CharacterAddedConnection then
                CharacterAddedConnection:Disconnect()
                CharacterAddedConnection = nil
            end
            Library:Notify({
                Title = "自然灾害",
                Description = "刹除跌落伤害 已关闭",
                Time = 3,
            })
        end
    end
})

local WeatherEffectConnection = nil

MainLeft:AddToggle("RemoveWeather", {
    Text = "刹除暴风雪和沙尘暴",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            pcall(function()
                if player.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("BlizzardGui") then
                    player.PlayerGui.BlizzardGui:Destroy()
                end
                if player.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("SandStormGui") then
                    player.PlayerGui.SandStormGui:Destroy()
                end
            end)
            WeatherEffectConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                pcall(function()
                    if player.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("BlizzardGui") then
                        player.PlayerGui.BlizzardGui:Destroy()
                    end
                    if player.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("SandStormGui") then
                        player.PlayerGui.SandStormGui:Destroy()
                    end
                end)
            end)
        else
            if WeatherEffectConnection then
                WeatherEffectConnection:Disconnect()
                WeatherEffectConnection = nil
            end
        end
    end
})

MainRight:AddToggle("WalkOnWater", {
    Text = "在水上行趋",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        pcall(function()
            if Value then
                Workspace.WaterLevel.CanCollide = true
                Workspace.WaterLevel.Size = Vector3.new(5000, 1, 5000)
            else
                Workspace.WaterLevel.CanCollide = false
                Workspace.WaterLevel.Size = Vector3.new(10, 1, 10)
            end
        end)
    end
})

MainRight:AddToggle("LowerRocks", {
    Text = "开启游戏岛悬崖碰撞体积",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        pcall(function()
            for _, v in pairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if v.Name == "LowerRocks" then
                    v.CanCollide = Value
                end
            end
        end)
    end
})

MainRight:AddToggle("MapVoteUI", {
    Text = "地图投票用户界面",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        pcall(function()
            local MapVotePage = player.PlayerGui.MainGui.MapVotePage
            MapVotePage.Visible = Value
        end)
    end
})

MainRight:AddToggle("GodMode", {
    Text = "无敌",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            pcall(function()
                local lp = Players.LocalPlayer
                local char = lp.Character or lp.CharacterAdded:Wait()
                local hum = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                local rootpart = hum and hum.RootPart
                if not rootpart then return end
                local oldpos = rootpart.CFrame
                hum:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Dead, false)
                rootpart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new(9e9, 9e9, 9e9)
                task.wait(.5)
                rootpart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
                rootpart.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero
                rootpart.CFrame = oldpos
            end)
            Library:Notify({
                Title = "通知",
                Description = "无敌已开启",
                Time = 1,
            })
        else
            Library:Notify({
                Title = "通知",
                Description = "无敌已关闭",
                Time = 1,
            })
        end
    end
})

MainRight:AddButton({
    Text = "指南针",
    Func = function()
        pcall(function()
            local r = ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.Compass
            local c = player.Backpack:WaitForChild("Compass")
            local h = player.Character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
            h:EquipTool(c)
            task.wait()
            r:FireServer("Vote Map", 3)
            r:FireServer("Vote Map", 4)
            task.wait()
            h:UnequipTools()
        end)
        Library:Notify({
            Title = "通知",
            Description = "加载成功",
            Time = 1,
        })
    end
})

MainRight:AddButton({
    Text = "汉化祖国人",
    Func = function()
        pcall(function()
            loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/-/refs/heads/main/祖国人汉化"))()
        end)
        Library:Notify({
            Title = "通知",
            Description = "加载成功",
            Time = 1,
        })
    end
})

local UnloadGroup = Tabs.Settings:AddLeftGroupbox("脚本管理")
UnloadGroup:AddButton({
    Text = "卸载脚本",
    Func = function()
        if NoClipConnection then
            NoClipConnection:Disconnect()
            NoClipConnection = nil
        end
        if FallDamageConnection then
            FallDamageConnection:Disconnect()
            FallDamageConnection = nil
        end
        if CharacterAddedConnection then
            CharacterAddedConnection:Disconnect()
            CharacterAddedConnection = nil
        end
        if WeatherEffectConnection then
            WeatherEffectConnection:Disconnect()
            WeatherEffectConnection = nil
        end
        _G.autowinfarm = false
        DisasterDetectionEnabled = false
        NotificationDisasterEnabled = false
        ChatDisasterEnabled = false
        Library:Unload()
    end
})

if ThemeManager then
    ThemeManager:SetLibrary(Library)
    ThemeManager:SetFolder("MyScriptTheme")
    ThemeManager:ApplyToTab(Tabs.Settings)
end

if SaveManager then
    SaveManager:SetLibrary(Library)
    SaveManager:IgnoreThemeSettings()
    SaveManager:SetFolder("MyScriptConfig")
    SaveManager:BuildConfigSection(Tabs.Settings)
end
]===]

ServerScripts["最强战场"] = [===[
local function safeLoad(url)
    local success, result = pcall(function()
        return loadstring(game:HttpGet(url))()
    end)
    if not success then
        warn("加载失败: " .. url)
        return nil
    end
    return result
end

local Library = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/黑曜石主库.ui")
local ThemeManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/主题管理.ui")
local SaveManager = safeLoad("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kongbaNB/ui/refs/heads/main/配置管理.ui")

if not Library then
    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification", {
        Title = "错误",
        Text = "UI 库加载失败，请检查网络或脚本资源",
        Duration = 5,
    })
    return
end

local Options = Library.Options
local Toggles = Library.Toggles
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local Window = Library:CreateWindow({
    Title = "最强战场",
    Footer = "终极战场 | 恐拜大帝 制作",
    Icon = 131153193945220,
    NotifySide = "Right",
    ShowCustomCursor = true,
})

Library:Notify("最强战场脚本已加载 - 创作者：终极战场", 5)

local Tabs = {
    Notice = Window:AddTab("通知", "info"),
    Main = Window:AddTab("主要", "star"),
    Settings = Window:AddTab("设置", "settings"),
}

local NoticeGroup = Tabs.Notice:AddLeftGroupbox("作者消息")
NoticeGroup:AddLabel('终极战场 - 最强战场脚本')

local lockTargetPlayer = nil
local lockConnection = nil
local lockEnabled = false
local lockBackEnabled = false
local lockCircleEnabled = false
local lockLookAtEnabled = false
local lockUndergroundEnabled = false
local circleAngle = 0

local rangeParts = {}
local rangeConn = nil

local function stopLock()
    if lockConnection then
        lockConnection:Disconnect()
        lockConnection = nil
    end
end

local function startLock()
    stopLock()
    lockConnection = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
        if not lockEnabled or not lockTargetPlayer then return end
        local myChar = player.Character
        local targetChar = lockTargetPlayer.Character
        if not myChar or not targetChar then return end
        local myHRP = myChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        local targetHRP = targetChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if not myHRP or not targetHRP then return end

        local targetPos = targetHRP.Position
        local newPos

        if lockUndergroundEnabled then
            local behind = -targetHRP.CFrame.LookVector * 1.5
            newPos = targetPos + behind
            newPos = Vector3.new(newPos.X, targetPos.Y - 2.2, newPos.Z)
        elseif lockCircleEnabled then
            circleAngle = circleAngle + math.rad(4)
            local radius = 3
            newPos = targetPos + Vector3.new(math.cos(circleAngle) * radius, 0, math.sin(circleAngle) * radius)
        elseif lockBackEnabled then
            local backOffset = -targetHRP.CFrame.LookVector * 2.5
            newPos = targetPos + backOffset
        else
            newPos = targetPos + Vector3.new(0, 0, -2)
        end

        if lockLookAtEnabled then
            myHRP.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(newPos, targetPos)
        else
            myHRP.CFrame = CFrame.new(newPos)
        end
    end)
end

local function clearRange()
    if rangeConn then
        rangeConn:Disconnect()
        rangeConn = nil
    end
    for _, part in ipairs(rangeParts) do
        if part then part:Destroy() end
    end
    rangeParts = {}
end

local HitboxGroup = Tabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("碰撞箱扩大")
HitboxGroup:AddToggle('HitboxExpand', {
    Text = '碰撞箱扩大',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        local Core = require(ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Core"))
        local orig = Core.Get("Combat", "Hit").Box
        if state then
            Core.Get("Combat", "Hit").Box = function(_, char, data)
                data = data or {}
                data.Size = Vector3.new(150, 150, 150)
                return orig(nil, char, data)
            end
        else
            Core.Get("Combat", "Hit").Box = orig
        end
    end
})
HitboxGroup:AddInput('HitboxX', {
    Text = '碰撞箱X轴',
    Default = "150",
    Callback = function(value)
    end
})
HitboxGroup:AddInput('HitboxY', {
    Text = '碰撞箱Y轴',
    Default = "150",
    Callback = function(value)
    end
})
HitboxGroup:AddInput('HitboxZ', {
    Text = '碰撞箱Z轴',
    Default = "150",
    Callback = function(value)
    end
})
HitboxGroup:AddToggle('ShowRange', {
    Text = '显示攻击碰撞箱范围',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        clearRange()
        if state then
            local radius = 60
            local segments = 60
            for i = 1, segments do
                local part = Instance.new("Part")
                part.Anchored = true
                part.CanCollide = false
                part.Size = Vector3.new(0.2, 0.2, radius * 2 * math.pi / segments)
                part.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
                part.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
                part.Parent = workspace
                rangeParts[i] = part
            end
            rangeConn = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                local hrp = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if not hrp then return end
                local pos = hrp.Position - Vector3.new(0, 0.9, 0)
                for i, part in ipairs(rangeParts) do
                    if part then
                        local angle = (i / segments) * 2 * math.pi
                        part.Position = pos + Vector3.new(math.cos(angle) * radius, 0, math.sin(angle) * radius)
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

local LockGroup = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("锁人功能")

local lockDropdown = LockGroup:AddDropdown('LockTarget', {
    Text = '选择目标玩家',
    Values = { "无" },
    Default = "无",
    Callback = function(name)
        if name == "无" then
            lockTargetPlayer = nil

            lockTargetPlayer = Players:FindFirstChild(name)
        end
        if lockEnabled then
            startLock()
        end
    end

    Func = function()
        local names = {}
        for _, p in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if p ~= player then
                table.insert(names, p.Name)
            end
        end
        if #names == 0 then
            names = { "无" }
        end
        pcall(function()
            lockDropdown:SetValues(names)
        end)
    end
})

    local names = {}
    for _, p in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if p ~= player then
            table.insert(names, p.Name)
        end
    end
    if #names == 0 then
        names = { "无" }
    end
    pcall(function()
        lockDropdown:SetValues(names)
    end)
end)

    local names = {}
    for _, p in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if p ~= player then
            table.insert(names, p.Name)
        end
    end
    if #names == 0 then
        names = { "无" }

        lockDropdown:SetValues(names)
    end)

local ExtraLeft = Tabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("传送")
local TPYW = nil
ExtraLeft:AddDropdown('TeleportLocation', {
    Text = '传送位置',
    Values = { "地图", "山脉", "安全港", "秘密房间1", "秘密房间2" },
    Default = "地图",
    Callback = function(option)
        local hrp = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if not hrp then return end
        if option == "地图" then
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(63.4928513, 440.505829, -92.9229507)
        elseif option == "山脉" then
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(253.515198, 699.103455, 420.533813)
        elseif option == "安全港" then
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(-774.454834, -137.237228, 126.384216)
        elseif option == "秘密房间1" then
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(-62, 29, 20338)
        elseif option == "秘密房间2" then
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(1068, 133, 23015)
        end
    end
})
ExtraLeft:AddButton({
    Text = '设置原位',
    Func = function()
        local hrp = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if hrp then
            TPYW = hrp.CFrame
        end
    end
})
ExtraLeft:AddButton({
    Text = '传送原位',
    Func = function()
        if TPYW then
            local hrp = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if hrp then
                hrp.CFrame = TPYW
            end
        end
    end
})

local ExtraRight = Tabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("战斗辅助")
ExtraRight:AddToggle('AutoAttack', {
    Text = '自动攻击',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            task.spawn(function()
                while state do
                    task.wait(0.3)
                    local char = player.Character
                    if char then
                        local communicate = char:FindFirstChild("Communicate")
                        if communicate then
                            communicate:FireServer({ ["Goal"] = "LeftClick" })
                            task.wait(0.05)
                            communicate:FireServer({ ["Goal"] = "LeftClickRelease" })
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})
ExtraRight:AddToggle('AutoUltimate', {
    Text = '自动开大',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)

            task.spawn(function()

ExtraRight:AddToggle('CancelDashEndlag', {
    Text = '取消冲刺后摇',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            local frontDashArgs = { [1] = { Dash = Enum.KeyCode.W, Key = Enum.KeyCode.Q, Goal = "KeyPress" } }
            local function frontDash()
                if player.Character then
                    local communicate = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Communicate")
                    if communicate then
                        communicate:FireServer(unpack(frontDashArgs))
                    end
                end
            end
            UIS.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, t)
                if t then return end
                if state and input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q and not UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.D) and not UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.A) and not UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.S) and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("UsedDash") then
                    frontDash()
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

})

ExtraRight:AddToggle('AutoTrashMaster', {
    Text = '自动垃圾桶',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            task.spawn(function()
                local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
                local TRASH_RANGE = 15
                local PLAYER_RANGE = 100
                local PICKUP_DISTANCE = 2
                local ATTACK_DISTANCE = 2
                local HEIGHT_OFFSET = 3
                local character, rootPart, humanoid
                local function update()
                    character = player.Character
                    if character then
                        rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                    else
                        rootPart = nil
                        humanoid = nil
                    end
                end
                update()
                player.CharacterAdded:Connect(update)
                while state and RunService.Heartbeat:Wait() do
                    pcall(function()
                        update()
                        if not character or not rootPart or not humanoid or humanoid.Health <= 0 then
                            task.wait(1)
                            return
                        end
                        if not character:GetAttribute("HasTrashcan") then
                            local trashFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Trash") or (Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map") and Workspace.Map:FindFirstChild("Trash"))
                            if not trashFolder then
                                task.wait(1)
                                return
                            end
                            local nearestTrash, nearestDist, trashPos
                            for _, trash in ipairs(trashFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                if trash:IsA("Model") then
                                    local part = trash:FindFirstChild("Handle") or trash:FindFirstChild("MainPart") or trash.PrimaryPart
                                    if part then
                                        local dist = (rootPart.Position - part.Position).Magnitude
                                        if dist <= TRASH_RANGE and (not nearestDist or dist < nearestDist) then
                                            nearestTrash = trash
                                            nearestDist = dist
                                            trashPos = part.Position
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                            if nearestTrash then
                                local dir = (trashPos - rootPart.Position).Unit
                                dir = Vector3.new(dir.X, 0, dir.Z).Unit
                                local targetPos = trashPos + dir * PICKUP_DISTANCE
                                rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPos)
                                task.wait(0.2)
                                dir = (trashPos - rootPart.Position).Unit
                                local look = Vector3.new(dir.X, 0, dir.Z).Unit
                                if look.Magnitude > 0.1 then
                                    rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(rootPart.Position, rootPart.Position + look)
                                end
                                local comm = character:FindFirstChild("Communicate")
                                if comm then
                                    comm:FireServer({ Goal = "LeftClick" })
                                    task.wait(0.15)
                                    comm:FireServer({ Goal = "LeftClickRelease" })
                                end
                                local t = 0
                                while t < 2 and state do
                                    if character:GetAttribute("HasTrashcan") then break end
                                    task.wait(0.1)
                                    t = t + 0.1
                                end
                            else
                                task.wait(1)
                            end
                        else
                            local nearestPlayer = nil
                            local minDist = PLAYER_RANGE
                            for _, p in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                                if p ~= player and p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and p.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") and p.Character.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
                                    local dist = (rootPart.Position - p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
                                    if dist < minDist then
                                        nearestPlayer = p
                                        minDist = dist
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                            if nearestPlayer then
                                local targetRoot = nearestPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
                                local behind = targetRoot.Position - (targetRoot.CFrame.LookVector * ATTACK_DISTANCE)
                                rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(behind)
                                task.wait(0.2)
                                local look = (targetRoot.Position - rootPart.Position).Unit
                                look = Vector3.new(look.X, 0, look.Z).Unit
                                if look.Magnitude > 0.1 then
                                    rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(rootPart.Position, rootPart.Position + look)
                                end
                                local comm = character:FindFirstChild("Communicate")
                                if comm then
                                    comm:FireServer({ Goal = "LeftClick" })
                                    task.wait(0.1)
                                    comm:FireServer({ Goal = "LeftClickRelease" })
                                end
                                task.wait(1.5)
                            else
                                task.wait(1)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})
ExtraRight:AddToggle('AutoTrashV2', {
    Text = '自动垃圾桶V2',
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            task.spawn(function()
                local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
                local RANGE = 5
                while state do
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    pcall(function()
                        local char = player.Character
                        if not char then return end
                        local root = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        if not root then return end
                        local folder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Trash") or (Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map") and Workspace.Map:FindFirstChild("Trash"))
                        if not folder then return end
                        local nearest, nearestDist
                        for _, trash in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
                            if trash:IsA("Model") then
                                local part = trash:FindFirstChild("Handle") or trash:FindFirstChild("MainPart") or trash.PrimaryPart
                                if part then
                                    local dist = (root.Position - part.Position).Magnitude
                                    if dist <= RANGE and (not nearestDist or dist < nearestDist) then
                                        nearest = trash
                                        nearestDist = dist
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                        if nearest then
                            local pos = nearest:GetPivot().Position
                            local dir = (pos - root.Position).Unit
                            dir = Vector3.new(dir.X, 0, dir.Z).Unit
                            root.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(root.Position, root.Position + dir)
                            if not char:GetAttribute("HasTrashcan") then
                                local comm = char:FindFirstChild("Communicate")
                                if comm then
                                    comm:FireServer({ Goal = "LeftClick" })
                                    task.wait(0.05)
                                    comm:FireServer({ Goal = "LeftClickRelease" })
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

SetGroup:AddButton({
    Text = '卸载脚本',
    Func = function()
        stopLock()
        clearRange()
        Library:Unload()
    end
})

    Text = '重载界面',
    Func = function()
        Library:Unload()
    end
})

})
